<svg id="rm" onclick="SFF()" viewBox="0 0 100 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <line x1="50" y1="12" x2="50" y2="22" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle class="ad" cx="50" cy="9" r="4" fill="#00aaff"/>
  <rect x="18" y="22" width="64" height="52" rx="12" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="25" y="29" width="50" height="32" rx="6" fill="#002a50"/>
  <circle cx="38" cy="43" r="7" fill="#001428"/><circle cx="38" cy="43" r="4.5" fill="#00aaff" opacity=".9"/><circle cx="39.5" cy="41.5" r="1.5" fill="#fff"/>
  <circle cx="62" cy="43" r="7" fill="#001428"/><circle cx="62" cy="43" r="4.5" fill="#00aaff" opacity=".9"/><circle cx="63.5" cy="41.5" r="1.5" fill="#fff"/>
  <path d="M38 54 Q50 62 62 54" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="3" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#00aaff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="81" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="3" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#00aaff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="40" y="74" width="20" height="10" rx="3" fill="#001a30" stroke="#0066cc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="22" y="84" width="56" height="38" rx="10" fill="#001428" stroke="#0066cc" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="32" y="91" width="36" height="22" rx="5" fill="#002244"/>
  <circle cx="42" cy="100" r="4" fill="#00aaff" opacity=".8"/>
  <circle cx="50" cy="100" r="4" fill="#33ccff" opacity=".6"/>
  <circle cx="58" cy="100" r="4" fill="#0066cc" opacity=".8"/>
  <rect x="30" y="116" width="12" height="6" rx="2" fill="#0066cc"/>
  <rect x="58" y="116" width="12" height="6" rx="2" fill="#0066cc"/>
</svg>

<script>
var curPart = 0;

// Global safe element helpers
function $(id){return document.getElementById(id);}
function $set(id,prop,val){var e=$(id); if(e) e[prop]=val;}
function $cls(id,action,cls){var e=$(id); if(e&&e.classList) e.classList[action](cls);}



// ── MATRIX ──
(function(){var c=document.getElementById('mx'),x=c.getContext('2d');function r(){c.width=innerWidth;c.height=innerHeight;}r();addEventListener('resize',r);var ch='アイウエオ01ABCDEF{}if for return void int',fs=13,dr=[];setInterval(function(){var cols=Math.floor(c.width/fs);while(dr.length<cols)dr.push(1);x.fillStyle='rgba(0,8,20,.045)';x.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);x.font=fs+'px Share Tech Mono,monospace';for(var i=0;i<cols;i++){var s=ch[Math.floor(Math.random()*ch.length)];x.fillStyle=Math.random()>.95?'#fff':Math.random()>.5?'#33ccff':'#00aaff';x.fillText(s,i*fs,dr[i]*fs);if(dr[i]*fs>c.height&&Math.random()>.975)dr[i]=0;dr[i]++;}},42);})();

// ── MACCHINARI BG ──
(function(){var c=document.getElementById('macbg'),cx=c.getContext('2d');function resize(){c.width=innerWidth;c.height=innerHeight;}resize();addEventListener('resize',resize);var syms=['EEG','fMRI','PET','MEG','TMS','BCI','∿∿∿','⊗','◎','⊕','∫∫','ΔV'],shapes=[];for(var i=0;i<28;i++){shapes.push({x:Math.random()*innerWidth,y:Math.random()*innerHeight,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.4,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.35,sym:syms[Math.floor(Math.random()*syms.length)],size:10+Math.random()*18,alpha:.15+Math.random()*.22,rot:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,rotV:(Math.random()-.5)*.012});}function draw(){cx.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);shapes.forEach(function(s){s.x+=s.vx;s.y+=s.vy;s.rot+=s.rotV;if(s.x<-50)s.x=c.width+50;if(s.x>c.width+50)s.x=-50;if(s.y<-50)s.y=c.height+50;if(s.y>c.height+50)s.y=-50;cx.save();cx.translate(s.x,s.y);cx.rotate(s.rot);cx.globalAlpha=s.alpha;cx.font='bold '+s.size+'px Share Tech Mono,monospace';cx.fillStyle='#33ccff';cx.fillText(s.sym,-cx.measureText(s.sym).width/2,s.size/3);cx.restore();});requestAnimationFrame(draw);}draw();})();

// ── TYPING ──
var tlines=['SYSTEM BOOT... OK','ROBOTICS MODULE LOADED','PRESS START >>'],tl=0,tc=0,tel=document.getElementById('sline');
function TN(){if(!tel)return;var s=tlines[tl%tlines.length];if(tc<=s.length){tel.innerHTML=s.slice(0,tc)+'<span class="cur"></span>';tc++;setTimeout(TN,65);}else{setTimeout(function(){tl++;tc=0;TN();},1600);}}
setTimeout(TN,800);

// ── SKETCH FUNCTION ──
function SKETCH(imgSrc, canvasId, cb){
  var img=new Image();
  img.onload=function(){
    var cv=document.getElementById(canvasId);
    var mw=Math.min(innerWidth*.85,500),sc=mw/img.width;
    cv.width=img.width*sc;cv.height=img.height*sc;
    var cx=cv.getContext('2d');cx.drawImage(img,0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    var id=cx.getImageData(0,0,cv.width,cv.height),d=id.data,w=cv.width,h=cv.height;
    var gr=new Uint8Array(w*h);
    for(var i=0;i<w*h;i++)gr[i]=.299*d[i*4]+.587*d[i*4+1]+.114*d[i*4+2];
    var out=cx.createImageData(w,h),o=out.data;
    for(var y=1;y<h-1;y++)for(var x=1;x<w-1;x++){
      var gx=-gr[(y-1)*w+(x-1)]+gr[(y-1)*w+(x+1)]-2*gr[y*w+(x-1)]+2*gr[y*w+(x+1)]-gr[(y+1)*w+(x-1)]+gr[(y+1)*w+(x+1)];
      var gy=-gr[(y-1)*w+(x-1)]-2*gr[(y-1)*w+x]-gr[(y-1)*w+(x+1)]+gr[(y+1)*w+(x-1)]+2*gr[(y+1)*w+x]+gr[(y+1)*w+(x+1)];
      var m=Math.min(255,Math.sqrt(gx*gx+gy*gy)*1.5),idx=(y*w+x)*4;
      if(m>18){o[idx]=Math.max(0,200-m*.3);o[idx+1]=Math.max(0,220-m*.2);o[idx+2]=255;o[idx+3]=Math.min(255,m*1.3);}
      else{o[idx]=o[idx+1]=o[idx+2]=0;o[idx+3]=0;}
    }
    cx.putImageData(out,0,0);
    if(cb)cb();
  };
  img.src=imgSrc;
}

// Pre-render all sketches
SKETCH('data:image/jpeg;base64,','hcP1');
SKETCH('data:image/jpeg;base64,','hcP2');
SKETCH('data:image/jpeg;base64,','hcP3');


function transitionAudio(part) {
  try {
    var ac = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    var now = ac.currentTime;
    function tone(f,s,d,t,v){t=t||'sine';v=v||.06;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+.08);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    function sw(f0,f1,s,d,t,v){t=t||'sine';v=v||.05;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+.07);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    if(part===2){
      sw(60,180,0,3,'sine',.07);
      sw(180,80,1,2,'triangle',.05);
      [200,400,800,1200,1600].forEach(function(f,i){tone(f,.5+i*.3,.15,'sine',.04);});
      tone(45,2,1.2,'triangle',.08);
      sw(800,200,3,1,'sine',.06);
      tone(110,3.5,.8,'triangle',.07);
    } else if(part===3){
      sw(40,300,0,3.5,'sawtooth',.05);
      [880,1320,1760,2200].forEach(function(f,i){tone(f,.3+i*.15,.08,'square',.03);});
      sw(1500,200,1.5,1.5,'sine',.06);
      [1000,1200,800].forEach(function(f,i){tone(f,2+i*.25,.1,'square',.04);});
      sw(60,1800,3.5,.8,'sine',.07);
      tone(80,4,.8,'triangle',.08);
    }
  } catch(e){}
}

// ── AUDIO ──
function AUD(){var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(),now=ac.currentTime;function T(f,s,d,t,v){t=t||'sine';v=v||.07;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+.06);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}function S(f0,f1,s,d,t,v){t=t||'sine';v=v||.05;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+.07);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}[220,440,660,880].forEach(function(f,i){T(f,i*.14,.1,'square',.02);});S(60,350,.8,3.5,'sawtooth',.04);S(350,1400,.8,3,'sine',.04);T(80,1.2,1.5,'triangle',.09);T(160,1.6,1,'sine',.07);S(200,50,2.5,2,'sawtooth',.04);T(55,3,1,'triangle',.1);S(100,1400,3.8,.7,'sine',.08);[1760,880,440].forEach(function(f,i){T(f,4.5+i*.1,.1,'square',.03);});S(1500,180,4.55,1,'sine',.09);T(110,4.7,.6,'triangle',.11);}

// ── SCREEN TRANSITIONS ──
function showScreen(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s){s.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById(id).scrollTop=0;
}

function hideAllTitles(){
  ['ftLA','ftEF','lpHero','ftS2','ftNE','ftT3','ftMC'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(!el)return;
    el.className='ftitle';
    el.style.cssText='top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);opacity:0';
  });
}

function animTitle(id, delay, movDir, fontSize){
  setTimeout(function(){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);
    el.style.fontSize=fontSize||'';
    el.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');
    setTimeout(function(){
      el.classList.remove('flash-anim');
      el.classList.add(movDir);
    },delay+3600);
  },delay);
}

// BLACK FADE TRANSITION
function blackFade(cb){
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(!bl){cb();return;}
  bl.style.transition='opacity .7s';
  bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';
  setTimeout(function(){cb();bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';},800);
}

// ── START PART 1 ──
function startP1(){
  AUD();
  curPart=1;
  document.getElementById('scIntro').classList.remove('active');
  hideAllTitles();
  showScreen('scP1');
  setTimeout(function(){
    document.getElementById('hwP1').classList.add('zi');
    document.getElementById('beamP1').classList.add('go');
  },100);
  // LA ROBOTICA → top right
  var la=document.getElementById('ftLA');
  la.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,10vw,8rem);font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;white-space:nowrap;z-index:50;pointer-events:none';
  setTimeout(function(){la.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){la.classList.remove('flash-anim');la.classList.add('move-right');},3600);},4500);
  // ED FISICA → top left
  var ef=document.getElementById('ftEF');
  ef.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,5.5rem);font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;z-index:50;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;line-height:1.4';
  setTimeout(function(){ef.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){ef.classList.remove('flash-anim');ef.classList.add('move-left');},3200);},9800);
  // LE PROTESI center
  setTimeout(function(){document.getElementById('lpHero').classList.add('on');},15000);
  RV('scP1');
}

// ── GO TO PART 2 ──
function goToP2(){
  transitionAudio(2);
  blackFade(function(){
    curPart=2;
    // hide p1 titles
    ['ftLA','ftEF','lpHero'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);el.className='ftitle';el.style.opacity='0';});
    hideP1Titles();
    showScreen('scP2');
    document.getElementById('macbg').classList.remove('show');
    setTimeout(function(){
      document.getElementById('hwP2').classList.add('zi');
      document.getElementById('beamP2').classList.add('go');
    },100);
    // I NEURONI E IL CERVELLO → top right
    var ne=document.getElementById('ftNE');
    ne.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,4.5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;white-space:nowrap;z-index:50;pointer-events:none;text-align:center';
    setTimeout(function(){ne.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){ne.classList.remove('flash-anim');ne.classList.add('move-right');},3600);},4500);
    // SECONDA PARTE SCIENZE → top left
    var s2=document.getElementById('ftS2');
    s2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;z-index:50;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;line-height:1.5';
    setTimeout(function(){s2.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){s2.classList.remove('flash-anim');s2.classList.add('move-left');},3200);},9800);
    initNeuronTouch();
    initStatBars();
    RV('scP2');
    initQ2();
  });
}

function hideP1Titles(){['ftLA','ftEF','lpHero'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.className='ftitle';el.style.opacity='0';}});}
function hideP2Titles(){['ftNE','ftS2'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.className='ftitle';el.style.opacity='0';}});}

// ── GO TO PART 3 ──
function goToP3(){
  transitionAudio(3);
  blackFade(function(){
    curPart=3;
    hideP2Titles();
    showScreen('scP3');
    document.getElementById('macbg').classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function(){
      document.getElementById('hwP3').classList.add('zi');
      document.getElementById('beamP3').classList.add('go');
    },100);
    // TERZA PARTE TECNOLOGIA → top left
    var t3=document.getElementById('ftT3');
    t3.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;z-index:50;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;line-height:1.5';
    setTimeout(function(){t3.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){t3.classList.remove('flash-anim');t3.classList.add('move-left');},3600);},4500);
    // I MACCHINARI → top right
    var mc=document.getElementById('ftMC');
    mc.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.75rem,2vw,1.3rem);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:transparent;opacity:0;z-index:50;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;max-width:80vw;line-height:1.5';
    setTimeout(function(){mc.classList.add('active-title','flash-anim');setTimeout(function(){mc.classList.remove('flash-anim');mc.classList.add('move-right');},3200);},9800);
    RV('scP3');
    initQ3();
  });
}

function goToP1(){
  blackFade(function(){
    curPart=1;
    hideP2Titles();
    ['ftT3','ftMC'].forEach(function(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.className='ftitle';el.style.opacity='0';}});
    document.getElementById('macbg').classList.remove('show');
    showScreen('scIntro');
  });
}

// ── REVEAL ──
var rvObs={};
function RV(screenId){
  var sc=document.getElementById(screenId);
  if(!sc)return;
  var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('vis');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.1,root:sc});
  sc.querySelectorAll('.rv').forEach(function(el){obs.observe(el);});
}

// ── STAT BARS ──
function initStatBars(){
  var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.querySelectorAll('.bfill').forEach(function(b){b.style.width=b.getAttribute('data-w');});obs.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.2,root:document.getElementById('scP2')});
  var sb=document.getElementById('statbars');if(sb)obs.observe(sb);
}

// ── 3D ARM ENGINE ──
(function(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('ac');
  var wp=document.getElementById('armwrap');
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  var rY=.5,rX=-.2,drag=false,lx=0,ly=0;
  window.fingerAngles=[0,0,0,0,0];
  window.elbowAngle=0;
  window.selectedFinger=-1;
  window.fingerOpen=[true,true,true,true,true];
  window.armStraight=true;
  function resize(){cv.width=wp.offsetWidth||400;cv.height=340;}
  resize();try{new ResizeObserver(resize).observe(wp);}catch(e){}
  function P(x,y,z){var cY=Math.cos(rY),sY=Math.sin(rY),cX=Math.cos(rX),sX=Math.sin(rX);var rx=x*cY+z*sY,rz=-x*sY+z*cY;var ry=y*cX-rz*sX,rz2=y*sX+rz*cX;var d=500/(500+rz2+400);var cx2=cv.width/2,cy2=cv.height/2+40;return{x:cx2+rx*d,y:cy2+ry*d,d:d};}
  function CYL(ax,ay,az,bx,by,bz,r,col){var A=P(ax,ay,az),B=P(bx,by,bz);var dx=B.x-A.x,dy=B.y-A.y,L=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);if(L<1)return;var rad=r*(A.d+B.d)*.5*90;var px=-dy/L*rad,py=dx/L*rad;var g=cx.createLinearGradient(A.x-px,A.y-py,A.x+px,A.y+py);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(180,220,255,.3)');g.addColorStop(.35,col);g.addColorStop(.65,col);g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,15,50,.85)');cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(A.x-px,A.y-py);cx.lineTo(B.x-px,B.y-py);cx.lineTo(B.x+px,B.y+py);cx.lineTo(A.x+px,A.y+py);cx.closePath();cx.fillStyle=g;cx.fill();}
  function SPH(x,y,z,r,col){var p2=P(x,y,z),rs=r*p2.d*90;if(rs<1)return;var g=cx.createRadialGradient(p2.x-rs*.3,p2.y-rs*.3,0,p2.x,p2.y,rs);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(160,225,255,.95)');g.addColorStop(.4,col);g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,8,35,.9)');cx.beginPath();cx.arc(p2.x,p2.y,rs,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fillStyle=g;cx.fill();}
  function DRAW(){cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    // Enhanced background: gradient + grid
    var bg=cx.createRadialGradient(cv.width/2,cv.height/2,0,cv.width/2,cv.height/2,Math.max(cv.width,cv.height)*.6);
    bg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,40,100,.25)');bg.addColorStop(.6,'rgba(0,15,40,.1)');bg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    cx.fillStyle=bg;cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    // Grid floor effect
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,150,255,.08)';cx.lineWidth=.5;
    for(var gy=0;gy<10;gy++){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(0,cv.height/2+gy*15);cx.lineTo(cv.width,cv.height/2+gy*15);cx.stroke();}
    
    // Color palette - more cinematic
    var ARM='rgba(20,60,110,.95)',JNT='rgba(0,140,200,.95)',FNG='rgba(15,80,140,.95)',HLT='rgba(0,200,255,.98)';
    var BEZEL='rgba(8,25,50,.95)';
    
    var eb=window.elbowAngle*.85;
    var sX=0,sY=-80;
    var eX=Math.sin(eb)*90,eY=-80+Math.cos(eb)*80;
    var wX=eX+Math.sin(eb*.6)*50,wY=eY+52-Math.cos(eb*.6)*8;
    
    // ── UPPER ARM with bicep bulge ──
    CYL(sX,sY,0,eX,eY,0,.22,ARM);
    // Servo at shoulder
    SPH(sX,sY,0,.27,JNT);
    SPH(sX,sY,5,.07,'rgba(255,180,0,.9)');  // status LED
    
    // Bicep detail rings
    for(var br=0;br<3;br++){
      var t=br/3;var bx=sX+(eX-sX)*t,by=sY+(eY-sY)*t;
      cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,180,255,.25)';cx.lineWidth=1;
      var pp=P(bx,by,0);cx.beginPath();cx.arc(pp.x,pp.y,18*pp.d,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();
    }
    
    // ── ELBOW joint with mechanical detail ──
    SPH(eX,eY,0,.23,JNT);
    SPH(eX,eY,4,.08,'rgba(0,255,200,.9)');  // joint LED
    SPH(eX,eY,-4,.08,'rgba(0,255,200,.9)');
    
    // ── FOREARM ──
    CYL(eX,eY,0,wX,wY,0,.17,ARM);
    
    // Forearm cable lines
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,200,255,.2)';cx.lineWidth=1.2;
    for(var fc=-1;fc<=1;fc++){
      var s2=P(eX+fc*4,eY,fc*3);var e2=P(wX+fc*4,wY,fc*3);
      cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(s2.x,s2.y);cx.lineTo(e2.x,e2.y);cx.stroke();
    }
    
    // ── WRIST ──
    SPH(wX,wY,0,.2,JNT);
    
    // ── PALM (more detailed) ──
    var pw=22;
    // Top edge
    CYL(wX-pw,wY+5,-12,wX+pw,wY+5,-12,.08,ARM);
    // Bottom edge
    CYL(wX-pw,wY+5,12,wX+pw,wY+5,12,.08,ARM);
    // Sides
    CYL(wX-pw,wY+5,-12,wX-pw,wY+5,12,.08,ARM);
    CYL(wX+pw,wY+5,-12,wX+pw,wY+5,12,.08,ARM);
    // Diagonal accent lines
    CYL(wX-pw+5,wY+8,-12,wX+pw-5,wY+8,-12,.04,'rgba(0,200,255,.3)');
    
    // Palm center plate (with subtle inner gradient)
    var palmP=P(wX,wY+5,0);
    var palmG=cx.createRadialGradient(palmP.x,palmP.y,0,palmP.x,palmP.y,32*palmP.d);
    palmG.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,80,160,.5)');
    palmG.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,20,55,.7)');
    cx.fillStyle=palmG;
    cx.beginPath();
    cx.ellipse(palmP.x,palmP.y,28*palmP.d,12*palmP.d,0,0,Math.PI*2);
    cx.fill();
    
    // ── FINGERS with 3 segments + knuckle rings ──
    var fps=[{x:wX-pw-3,y:wY+16,z:-2},{x:wX-pw/2,y:wY+16,z:-1},{x:wX,y:wY+16,z:0},{x:wX+pw/2,y:wY+16,z:1},{x:wX+pw+3,y:wY+16,z:2}];
    for(var i=0;i<5;i++){
      var f=fps[i],t=window.fingerAngles[i],sel=(i===window.selectedFinger),col=sel?HLT:FNG;
      var L1=i===0?14:20,L2=i===0?10:14;
      var c1=t*1.15,c2=t*1.6;
      var p1x=f.x+(i===0?-Math.sin(c1)*L1:0),p1y=f.y+Math.cos(c1)*L1;
      var p2x=p1x+(i===0?-Math.sin(c2)*L2:0),p2y=p1y+Math.cos(c2)*L2;
      var p3x=p2x,p3y=p2y+9*(1-t*.4);
      
      // Segment 1 (proximal)
      CYL(f.x,f.y,f.z,p1x,p1y,f.z,i===0?.07:.06,col);
      // Knuckle ring 1
      var knk1=P(p1x,p1y,f.z);
      cx.strokeStyle=sel?'rgba(0,220,255,.7)':'rgba(0,150,200,.4)';
      cx.lineWidth=1.5;
      cx.beginPath();cx.arc(knk1.x,knk1.y,7*knk1.d,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();
      
      // Segment 2 (middle)
      CYL(p1x,p1y,f.z,p2x,p2y,f.z,.052,col);
      SPH(p1x,p1y,f.z,.062,JNT);
      
      // Knuckle ring 2  
      var knk2=P(p2x,p2y,f.z);
      cx.strokeStyle=sel?'rgba(0,220,255,.6)':'rgba(0,150,200,.35)';
      cx.beginPath();cx.arc(knk2.x,knk2.y,5*knk2.d,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();
      
      // Segment 3 (distal/tip)
      CYL(p2x,p2y,f.z,p3x,p3y,f.z,.04,col);
      SPH(p2x,p2y,f.z,.054,JNT);
      // Fingertip with rounded cap
      SPH(p3x,p3y,f.z,.038,sel?HLT:'rgba(180,220,255,.9)');
      
      // Selection highlight: glowing ring + particles
      if(sel){
        var gp=P(p1x,p1y,f.z);
        var glow=cx.createRadialGradient(gp.x,gp.y,0,gp.x,gp.y,22);
        glow.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,220,255,.4)');
        glow.addColorStop(.5,'rgba(0,180,255,.2)');
        glow.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        cx.fillStyle=glow;cx.beginPath();cx.arc(gp.x,gp.y,22,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fill();
        cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,255,255,.8)';cx.lineWidth=2;
        cx.beginPath();cx.arc(gp.x,gp.y,18,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();
        // Particles
        var ti=Date.now()*.003;
        for(var pp2=0;pp2<6;pp2++){
          var ang=ti+pp2*Math.PI/3;
          var rad=22+Math.sin(ti*2+pp2)*4;
          cx.fillStyle='rgba(0,220,255,.7)';
          cx.beginPath();cx.arc(gp.x+Math.cos(ang)*rad,gp.y+Math.sin(ang)*rad,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fill();
        }
      }
    }
    
    // ── Circuit traces (more detailed) ──
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,180,255,.12)';cx.lineWidth=.8;
    [[sX,sY,eX,eY],[eX,eY,wX,wY]].forEach(function(l){
      for(var oi=-1;oi<=1;oi++){
        var s2=P(l[0]+oi*4,l[1],oi*1.5);var e2=P(l[2]+oi*4,l[3],oi*1.5);
        cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(s2.x,s2.y);cx.lineTo(e2.x,e2.y);cx.stroke();
      }
    });
    
    // Pulsing data flow along circuits
    var dt=Date.now()*.0008;
    cx.fillStyle='rgba(0,255,255,.9)';
    for(var df=0;df<3;df++){
      var dp=(dt+df*.33)%1;
      var dx=sX+(eX-sX)*dp,dy=sY+(eY-sY)*dp;
      var dpoint=P(dx,dy,0);
      cx.beginPath();cx.arc(dpoint.x,dpoint.y,2,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fill();
    }
    
    requestAnimationFrame(DRAW);}
  DRAW();
  wp.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){drag=true;lx=e.clientX;ly=e.clientY;e.preventDefault();});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!drag)return;rY+=(e.clientX-lx)*.014;rX+=(e.clientY-ly)*.012;lx=e.clientX;ly=e.clientY;});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){drag=false;});
  wp.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){drag=true;lx=e.touches[0].clientX;ly=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){if(!drag)return;rY+=(e.touches[0].clientX-lx)*.014;rX+=(e.touches[0].clientY-ly)*.012;lx=e.touches[0].clientX;ly=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchend',function(){drag=false;});
})();

function animateTo(arr,idx,target,ms){var s=arr[idx],t0=performance.now();(function step(now){var p=Math.min((now-t0)/ms,1),e=p<.5?2*p*p:1-Math.pow(-2*p+2,2)/2;arr[idx]=s+(target-s)*e;if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(step);})(t0);}
function animEA(target,ms){var s=window.elbowAngle,t0=performance.now();(function step(now){var p=Math.min((now-t0)/ms,1),e=p<.5?2*p*p:1-Math.pow(-2*p+2,2)/2;window.elbowAngle=s+(target-s)*e;if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(step);})(t0);}
var FN=['POLLICE','INDICE','MEDIO','ANULARE','MIGNOLO'];
function STAT(t){var e=document.getElementById('ast');if(e)e.textContent='▸ '+t;}
function showF(){document.getElementById('fp').classList.add('show');document.getElementById('aa').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('fa').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('bdt').classList.add('act');document.getElementById('bbr').classList.remove('act');STAT('SELEZIONA UN DITO');}
function showA(){document.getElementById('aa').classList.add('show');document.getElementById('fp').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('fa').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('bbr').classList.add('act');document.getElementById('bdt').classList.remove('act');STAT('CONTROLLO BRACCIO');}
function selF(i,btn){window.selectedFinger=i;document.querySelectorAll('.fbtn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('sel');});btn.classList.add('sel');document.getElementById('fa').classList.add('show');var open=window.fingerOpen[i];var _fab2=document.getElementById('fab');if(_fab2)_fab2.textContent=open?'▶ CHIUDI DITO':'▶ APRI DITO';STAT(FN[i]+': '+(open?'APERTO':'CHIUSO'));}
function togF(){var i=window.selectedFinger;if(i<0)return;window.fingerOpen[i]=!window.fingerOpen[i];var open=window.fingerOpen[i];animateTo(window.fingerAngles,i,open?0:1,450);var _fab2=document.getElementById('fab');if(_fab2)_fab2.textContent=open?'▶ CHIUDI DITO':'▶ APRI DITO';STAT(FN[i]+': '+(open?'APERTURA...':'CHIUSURA...'));setTimeout(function(){STAT(FN[i]+': '+(open?'APERTO':'CHIUSO'));},470);}
function togA(){window.armStraight=!window.armStraight;var s=window.armStraight;animEA(s?0:1,600);var _aab2=document.getElementById('aab');if(_aab2)_aab2.textContent=s?'▶ PIEGA BRACCIO':'▶ ESTENDI BRACCIO';STAT('BRACCIO: '+(s?'DISTENSIONE...':'FLESSIONE...'));setTimeout(function(){STAT('BRACCIO: '+(s?'ESTESO':'PIEGATO'));},620);}

// ── NEURON TOUCH ──
function initNeuronTouch(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('nc');var wp2=document.getElementById('ncwrap');var cx2=cv.getContext('2d');
  var pressed=false,px=0,py=0,particles=[],sparks=[];
  function resize(){cv.width=wp2.offsetWidth||600;cv.height=wp2.offsetHeight||360;}
  resize();try{new ResizeObserver(resize).observe(wp2);}catch(e){}
  function playZap(){
    if(window.__neuronMuted)return;
    try{
      var ac=window.__neuronAC||(window.__neuronAC=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)());
      var now=ac.currentTime;
      var noise=ac.createBufferSource();
      var buffer=ac.createBuffer(1,ac.sampleRate*0.15,ac.sampleRate);
      var data=buffer.getChannelData(0);
      for(var k=0;k<data.length;k++){data[k]=(Math.random()*2-1)*Math.pow(1-k/data.length,1.5);}
      noise.buffer=buffer;
      var fil=ac.createBiquadFilter();fil.type='bandpass';fil.frequency.value=2000+Math.random()*2000;fil.Q.value=8;
      var g=ac.createGain();g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.08,now+0.005);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,now+0.15);
      noise.connect(fil);fil.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);noise.start(now);
      var o=ac.createOscillator();o.type='sawtooth';
      o.frequency.setValueAtTime(800+Math.random()*800,now);
      o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(100,now+0.1);
      var og=ac.createGain();og.gain.setValueAtTime(0.04,now);og.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,now+0.1);
      o.connect(og);og.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now);o.stop(now+0.12);
    }catch(e){}
  }
  function pulse(x,y){playZap();var i,n=8+Math.floor(Math.random()*8);for(i=0;i<n;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,sp=1.5+Math.random()*4;sparks.push({x:x,y:y,vx:Math.cos(a)*sp,vy:Math.sin(a)*sp,life:1,decay:.03+Math.random()*.04,size:1.5+Math.random()*2.5,col:'hsl('+(180+Math.random()*60)+',100%,'+(70+Math.random()*30)+'%)'});}for(i=0;i<3+Math.floor(Math.random()*3);i++){var len=30+Math.random()*80,angle=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,segs=5+Math.floor(Math.random()*5),pts=[{x:x,y:y}];for(var j=1;j<=segs;j++){var t2=j/segs,jit=20*(1-t2);pts.push({x:x+Math.cos(angle)*len*t2+(Math.random()-.5)*jit*2,y:y+Math.sin(angle)*len*t2+(Math.random()-.5)*jit*2});}particles.push({pts:pts,life:1,decay:.08+Math.random()*.06,w:1+Math.random()*2});}sparks.push({x:x,y:y,vx:0,vy:0,life:.8,decay:.04,size:0,maxSize:55+Math.random()*35,isRipple:true});}
  function draw(){cx2.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);if(pressed&&Math.random()<.4)pulse(px,py);var i;for(i=particles.length-1;i>=0;i--){var p2=particles[i];p2.life-=p2.decay;if(p2.life<=0){particles.splice(i,1);continue;}cx2.globalAlpha=p2.life;cx2.strokeStyle='hsl('+(200+Math.random()*40)+',100%,'+(80+Math.floor(Math.random()*20))+'%)';cx2.lineWidth=p2.w*p2.life;cx2.shadowBlur=12;cx2.shadowColor='rgba(100,200,255,.8)';cx2.beginPath();p2.pts.forEach(function(pt,j){j===0?cx2.moveTo(pt.x,pt.y):cx2.lineTo(pt.x,pt.y);});cx2.stroke();cx2.shadowBlur=0;}for(i=sparks.length-1;i>=0;i--){var s2=sparks[i];s2.life-=s2.decay;if(s2.life<=0){sparks.splice(i,1);continue;}if(s2.isRipple){s2.size=(1-s2.life)*s2.maxSize;cx2.globalAlpha=s2.life*.6;cx2.strokeStyle='rgba(100,210,255,.8)';cx2.lineWidth=2*s2.life;cx2.shadowBlur=8;cx2.shadowColor='rgba(0,180,255,.6)';cx2.beginPath();cx2.arc(s2.x,s2.y,s2.size,0,Math.PI*2);cx2.stroke();cx2.shadowBlur=0;}else{s2.x+=s2.vx;s2.y+=s2.vy;s2.vx*=.92;s2.vy*=.92;cx2.globalAlpha=s2.life;var g2=cx2.createRadialGradient(s2.x,s2.y,0,s2.x,s2.y,s2.size*2);g2.addColorStop(0,s2.col);g2.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');cx2.fillStyle=g2;cx2.beginPath();cx2.arc(s2.x,s2.y,s2.size*2,0,Math.PI*2);cx2.fill();}}cx2.globalAlpha=1;requestAnimationFrame(draw);}
  draw();
  function pos(e){var r=cv.getBoundingClientRect();return{x:(e.clientX-r.left)*cv.width/r.width,y:(e.clientY-r.top)*cv.height/r.height};}
  cv.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){var p3=pos(e);pressed=true;px=p3.x;py=p3.y;pulse(px,py);e.preventDefault();});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!pressed)return;var p4=pos(e);px=p4.x;py=p4.y;});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){pressed=false;});
  cv.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){var r=cv.getBoundingClientRect(),t=e.touches[0];px=(t.clientX-r.left)*cv.width/r.width;py=(t.clientY-r.top)*cv.height/r.height;pressed=true;pulse(px,py);e.preventDefault();},{passive:false});
  cv.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){var r=cv.getBoundingClientRect(),t=e.touches[0];px=(t.clientX-r.left)*cv.width/r.width;py=(t.clientY-r.top)*cv.height/r.height;e.preventDefault();},{passive:false});
  cv.addEventListener('touchend',function(){pressed=false;});
}

var Q1=[{q:'Qual \u00e8 il materiale pi\u00f9 usato nelle protesi sportive?',o:['Alluminio','Fibra di carbonio','Titanio','Acciaio'],a:1,e:'✅ Fibra di carbonio! Leggera e resistente — usata nella Cheetah Blade.'},{q:'Come captano i segnali le protesi mioelettriche?',o:['Telecamere','Elettrodi EMG','Infrarossi','Magneti'],a:1,e:'✅ EMG: rileva segnali elettrici dei muscoli residui.'},{q:'Quante prese diverse fa una mano bionica avanzata?',o:['5','10','24','50'],a:2,e:'✅ 24 prese! Programmabili via app.'},{q:'Chi ha vinto l\'oro con 4 protesi contemporaneamente?',o:['F.Pellegrini','Bebe Vio','S.Goggia','V.Vezzali'],a:1,e:'✅ Bebe Vio! Oro paralimpico di scherma.'},{q:'La prima protesi della storia risale a:',o:['100 d.C.','950 a.C.','1500 d.C.','1800 d.C.'],a:1,e:'✅ 950 a.C.! Un alluce in legno su una mummia egizia.'}];
var q1i=0,q1s=0;
function initQ1(){q1i=0;q1s=0;showQ1();}
function showQ1(){if(q1i>=Q1.length){endQ('qb1','🦾',q1s,Q1.length,'initQ1');return;}var q=Q1[q1i];var _eq1=document.getElementById('q1t');if(_eq1)_eq1.textContent='Domanda '+(q1i+1)+'/'+Q1.length+': '+q.q;var el=document.getElementById('q1o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ('q1',i,q1i,Q1,1);};el.appendChild(b);});document.getElementById('q1f').className='qfb';var _q1n=document.getElementById('q1n');if(_q1n)_q1n.className='qnx';}
function nxQ1(){q1i++;showQ1();}

// ── QUIZ 2 ──
var Q2=[{q:'Quanti neuroni ha il cervello umano?',o:['1 miliardo','10 miliardi','86 miliardi','1 trilione'],a:2,e:'✅ 86 miliardi! Quasi quante le stelle della Via Lattea.'},{q:'Come si chiama la capacit\u00e0 del cervello di formare nuove connessioni?',o:['Neurogenesi','Neuroplasticit\u00e0','Sinapsi','Mielinizzazione'],a:1,e:'✅ Neuroplasticit\u00e0! Il cervello si rimodella ogni volta che impari.'},{q:'Quale neurotrasmettitore \u00e8 legato al piacere?',o:['Serotonina','GABA','Dopamina','Glutammato'],a:2,e:'✅ Dopamina! Rilasciata quando raggiungi un obiettivo.'},{q:'A che velocit\u00e0 viaggia un segnale nervoso?',o:['10 m/s','50 m/s','120 m/s','300 m/s'],a:2,e:'✅ 120 m/s! Grazie alla guaina mielinica.'},{q:'Quanta energia consuma il cervello?',o:['5%','10%','20%','30%'],a:2,e:'✅ 20%! Lavora senza sosta anche mentre dormi.'}];
var q2i=0,q2s=0;
function initQ2(){q2i=0;q2s=0;showQ2();}
function showQ2(){if(q2i>=Q2.length){endQ('qb2','🧠',q2s,Q2.length,'initQ2');return;}var q=Q2[q2i];var _eq2=document.getElementById('q2t');if(_eq2)_eq2.textContent='Domanda '+(q2i+1)+'/'+Q2.length+': '+q.q;var el=document.getElementById('q2o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ('q2',i,q2i,Q2,2);};el.appendChild(b);});document.getElementById('q2f').className='qfb';var _q2n=document.getElementById('q2n');if(_q2n)_q2n.className='qnx';}
function nxQ2(){q2i++;showQ2();}

var Q3=[{q:'Quale macchinario misura i segnali elettrici con elettrodi sul cuoio capelluto?',o:['fMRI','PET','EEG','MEG'],a:2,e:'✅ EEG! Economico, veloce, usato anche a casa.'},{q:'Cosa misura la fMRI?',o:['Segnali elettrici','Flusso di sangue ossigenato','Campi magnetici','Radiazioni gamma'],a:1,e:'✅ Flusso di sangue ossigenato — le zone attive consumano pi\u00f9 ossigeno.'},{q:'Quale usa traccianti radioattivi?',o:['EEG','MEG','TMS','PET'],a:3,e:'✅ PET — Tomografia a Emissione di Positroni.'},{q:'Quanto prima rileva l\'Alzheimer la PET/fMRI?',o:['1 anno','5 anni','10 anni','20 anni'],a:3,e:'✅ 20 anni prima dei sintomi! Apre la strada a terapie preventive.'},{q:"Cos\'\u00e8 la TMS?",o:['Uno scanner','Stimolazione Magnetica Transcranica','Un analgesico','Un microprocessore'],a:1,e:'✅ TMS stimola i neuroni con impulsi magnetici!'}];
var q3i=0,q3s=0;
function initQ3(){q3i=0;q3s=0;showQ3();}
function showQ3(){if(q3i>=Q3.length){endQ('qb3','🔬',q3s,Q3.length,'initQ3');return;}var q=Q3[q3i];var _eq3=document.getElementById('q3t');if(_eq3)_eq3.textContent='Domanda '+(q3i+1)+'/'+Q3.length+': '+q.q;var el=document.getElementById('q3o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ('q3',i,q3i,Q3,3);};el.appendChild(b);});document.getElementById('q3f').className='qfb';var _q3n=document.getElementById('q3n');if(_q3n)_q3n.className='qnx';}
function nxQ3(){q3i++;showQ3();}

function ansQ(pfx,i,qi,QArr,n){var q=QArr[qi];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#'+pfx+'o .qo');opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});var fb=document.getElementById(pfx+'f');if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');if(n===1)q1s++;else if(n===2)q2s++;else q3s++;fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');fb.textContent='❌ '+q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}document.getElementById(pfx+'n').className='qnx show';}

function endQ(boxId,ico,score,total,restartFn){
  var qb=document.getElementById(boxId);if(!qb)return;
  var num=boxId.replace('qb','');
  var emj=score===total?'Perfetto!':score>=total/2?'Ottimo!':'Rileggi e riprova!';
  qb.innerHTML='<h3>QUIZ COMPLETATO!</h3>'
    +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:900;color:#33ccff;text-align:center;margin:16px 0">'+score+'/'+total+'</div>'
    +'<div style="text-align:center;color:#7ab8d4">'+emj+'</div>'
    +'<button class="qnx show" style="margin:12px auto;display:block;cursor:pointer" id="rb'+num+'">RICOMINCIA</button>';
  var rb=document.getElementById('rb'+num);
  if(rb)rb.onclick=function(){
    var titles={'1':'QUIZ — PROTESI','2':'QUIZ — NEURONI','3':'QUIZ — MACCHINARI','4':'QUIZ — STORIA'};
    qb.innerHTML='<h3>'+(titles[num]||'QUIZ')+'</h3>'
      +'<div class="qq" id="q'+num+'t"></div>'
      +'<div class="qopts" id="q'+num+'o"></div>'
      +'<div class="qfb" id="q'+num+'f"></div>'
      +'<button class="qnx" id="q'+num+'n" onclick="nxQ'+num+'()">PROSSIMA</button>';
    if(num==='1'){q1i=0;q1s=0;showQ1();}
    else if(num==='2'){q2i=0;q2s=0;showQ2();}
    else if(num==='3'){q3i=0;q3s=0;showQ3();}
    else if(num==='4'){q4i=0;q4s=0;showQ4();}
  };
};

var MD={
  corsa:{ico:'\u26a1',tag:'ATLETICA',h:'Protesi nella Corsa',b:'<p>La <strong>Cheetah Blade</strong> in fibra di carbonio funziona come una molla biologica. Alcuni atleti corrono i 100m in meno di 11 secondi.</p><ul><li>Fibra di carbonio, peso sotto 500g</li><li>Ritorno energetico fino all\'80%</li></ul>'},
  nuoto:{ico:'\u2693',tag:'NUOTO',h:'Protesi nel Nuoto',b:'<p>Protesi idrodinamiche ispirate ai delfini. <strong>Jessica Long</strong> ha vinto 13 ori paralimpici.</p><ul><li>Materiali idrofobi anti-corrosione</li></ul>'},
  ciclismo:{ico:'\u2699',tag:'CICLISMO',h:'Protesi nel Ciclismo',b:'<p>Attacchi rigidi migliorano l\'efficienza della pedalata del <strong>40%</strong>.</p><ul><li>Adattatori SPD universali</li><li>Sensori di potenza integrati</li></ul>'},
  basket:{ico:'\u2728',tag:'BASKET',h:'Protesi nel Basket',b:'<p>La <strong>i-Limb Ultra</strong> risponde in 100ms. 24 prese programmate via app.</p><ul><li>Resistenza agli urti IP67</li><li>Batteria 8 ore</li></ul>'},
  scherma:{ico:'\u2694',tag:'SCHERMA',h:'Protesi nella Scherma',b:'<p><strong>Bebe Vio</strong> ha vinto l\'oro con 4 protesi. Adattatori in alluminio con sgancio rapido.</p>'},
  arrampicata:{ico:'\u26f0',tag:'ARRAMPICATA',h:'Protesi nell\'Arrampicata',b:'<p>Punte in carbonio o gomma Vibram. Terminali a gancio per prese impossibili.</p>'},
  plasticita:{ico:'\u267b',tag:'NEUROPLASTICIT\u00c0',h:'Il Cervello che si Riscrive',b:'<p>Ogni volta che studi, nuove connessioni si formano.</p><ul><li>I musicisti hanno il corpo calloso pi\u00f9 grande</li><li>Bastano 21 giorni di pratica</li></ul>'},
  sogno:{ico:'\u263e',tag:'SONNO E MEMORIA',h:'Dormi e Impara Meglio',b:'<p>Dormire dopo aver studiato migliora la memoria del <strong>40%</strong>.</p><ul><li>La privazione di sonno danneggia i neuroni in 72 ore</li></ul>'},
  dopamina:{ico:'\u263a',tag:'NEUROTRASMETTITORI',h:'La Chimica delle Emozioni',b:'<ul><li><strong>Dopamina:</strong> piacere, motivazione</li><li><strong>Serotonina:</strong> umore, benessere</li><li><strong>Adrenalina:</strong> risposta al pericolo</li><li><strong>GABA:</strong> il freno del cervello</li></ul>'},
  aineuroni:{ico:'\u2699',tag:'AI E NEURONI',h:'Neuroni Biologici vs Artificiali',b:'<p>Il cervello \u00e8 1000 volte pi\u00f9 efficiente energeticamente dell\'AI migliore.</p><ul><li>Neuralink legge 1.024 neuroni simultaneamente</li></ul>'},
  malattie:{ico:'\u26a0',tag:'NEUROLOGIA',h:'Malattie del Sistema Nervoso',b:'<ul><li><strong>Alzheimer:</strong> proteine tossiche distruggono i neuroni</li><li><strong>Parkinson:</strong> morte dei neuroni dopaminergici</li><li><strong>Epilessia:</strong> scariche elettriche anomale</li></ul>'},
  record:{ico:'\u2605',tag:'RECORD',h:'I Record del Cervello',b:'<ul><li>Memoria stimata: <strong>2.5 petabyte</strong></li><li>Neuroni: <strong>86 miliardi</strong></li><li>Velocit\u00e0: <strong>120 m/s</strong></li><li>Energia: <strong>20 watt</strong></li></ul>'},
  eeg:{ico:'\u26a1',tag:'EEG',h:'EEG - Ascoltare il Cervello',b:'<p>Misura l\'attivit\u00e0 elettrica dei neuroni con elettrodi sul cuoio capelluto.</p><ul><li>Risoluzione temporale: millisecondi</li><li>Usato per epilessia, sonno, coma</li></ul>'},
  fmri:{ico:'\u2699',tag:'fMRI',h:'fMRI - Vedere i Pensieri',b:'<p>Misura il flusso di sangue ossigenato. Alta precisione spaziale, ritardo 2-5 secondi.</p><ul><li>Risoluzione: 1-3mm</li><li>Costo: 1-3 milioni di euro</li></ul>'},
  pet:{ico:'\u2622',tag:'PET',h:'PET - Radioattivit\u00e0 e Cervello',b:'<p>Usa un tracciante radioattivo. Le zone pi\u00f9 attive lo assorbono di pi\u00f9.</p><ul><li>Rileva Alzheimer 20 anni prima</li><li>Costo: 2.000-4.000 euro</li></ul>'},
  meg:{ico:'\u2728',tag:'MEG',h:'MEG - Campi Magnetici del Pensiero',b:'<p>Misura i campi magnetici dei neuroni. Meno di 200 macchine nel mondo.</p>'},
  neuralink:{ico:'\u2699',tag:'NEURALINK',h:'Neuralink e il Futuro',b:'<p>Ha impiantato chip cerebrali in pazienti umani nel 2024. Legge 1.024 neuroni simultaneamente.</p>'},
  futuro:{ico:'\u2728',tag:'IL FUTURO',h:'La Neurotecnologia del Futuro',b:'<ul><li>Neuroni artificiali che sostituiscono quelli danneggiati</li><li>Terapia diretta per depressione e Parkinson</li><li>Comunicazione telepatica gi\u00e0 dimostrata</li></ul>'},
  edison:{ico:'\u2728',tag:'INVENTORE',h:'Thomas Edison',b:'<p><strong>Thomas Edison (1847-1931)</strong> brevett\u00f2 oltre 1.000 invenzioni:</p><ul><li>Lampadina (1879)</li><li>Fonografo (1877)</li><li>Cinema Kinetoscope (1891)</li></ul>'},
  ford:{ico:'\u2699',tag:'INDUSTRIALE',h:'Henry Ford',b:'<p><strong>Henry Ford</strong> rivoluzion\u00f2 la produzione con la catena di montaggio nel 1908.</p><ul><li>Produzione ridotta da 12 ore a 90 minuti</li><li>15 milioni di Model T vendute</li></ul>'},
  tesla:{ico:'\u26a1',tag:'GENIO',h:'Nikola Tesla',b:'<p><strong>Nikola Tesla (1856-1943)</strong> invent\u00f2 la corrente alternata (AC).</p><ul><li>Motore a induzione AC</li><li>Bobina di Tesla per trasmissione wireless</li></ul>'},
  catena:{ico:'\u2692',tag:'INDUSTRIA',h:'La Fabbrica Moderna',b:'<p>La catena di montaggio ha trasformato il lavoro: ogni operaio fa una sola operazione ripetitiva.</p><ul><li>Pi\u00f9 efficienza, meno costi</li><li>Nascita della classe operaia urbana</li></ul>'},
  societa:{ico:'\u263a',tag:'SOCIET\u00c0',h:'Cambiamenti Sociali',b:'<ul><li><strong>Urbanizzazione</strong></li><li><strong>Sindacati</strong> e diritti operai</li><li><strong>Scuola dell\u2019obbligo</strong></li><li><strong>Donne nelle fabbriche</strong></li></ul>'},
  guerra:{ico:'\u2694',tag:'WWI',h:'La Prima Guerra Mondiale',b:'<p>La Seconda Rivoluzione termina con la <strong>WWI (1914-1918)</strong>:</p><ul><li>Mitragliatrici, carri armati, aerei</li><li>Gas tossici, sottomarini</li><li>16 milioni di morti</li></ul>'}
};

function OM(k){var s=MD[k];if(!s)return;var _mt=document.getElementById('mt'),_mi=document.getElementById('mi'),_mh=document.getElementById('mh'),_mb=document.getElementById('mb');if(_mt)_mt.textContent=s.tag;if(_mi)_mi.textContent=s.ico;if(_mh)_mh.textContent=s.h;if(_mb)_mb.innerHTML=s.b;document.getElementById('ov').classList.add('open');}
function CM(){document.getElementById('ov').classList.remove('open');}

// ── ROBOT FUN FACTS ──
var ROBOT_FACTS=[
  // Parte 1 (protesi)
  'La prima protesi risale al <strong>950 a.C.</strong>: alluce in legno su mummia egizia!',
  'Le protesi usano l\'<strong>AI</strong> per adattarsi al passo di ogni persona.',
  'Bebe Vio: oro olimpico con <strong>4 protesi</strong> contemporaneamente.',
  'La <strong>LUKE Arm</strong> ha 10 gradi di libert\u00e0 e pu\u00f2 sentire la pressione!',
  // Parte 2 (neuroni)
  'Il tuo cervello genera <strong>23 watt</strong> — abbastanza per una lampadina!',
  'Hai <strong>86 miliardi</strong> di neuroni — quasi quante le stelle della Via Lattea.',
  'Un segnale nervoso viaggia a <strong>120 m/s</strong> — pi\u00f9 veloce di un\'auto da corsa.',
  'Ogni pensiero che fai <strong>cambia fisicamente il cervello</strong>.',
  // Parte 3 (tecnologia)
  'L\'EEG fu inventato nel <strong>1924</strong> e tenuto segreto per 5 anni!',
  'Una fMRI usa un magnete <strong>60.000 volte pi\u00f9 potente</strong> del campo terrestre.',
  'La PET pu\u00f2 rilevare l\'<strong>Alzheimer 20 anni prima</strong> dei sintomi.',
  'Esistono gi\u00e0 <strong>caschi EEG da 50-200€</strong> per uso domestico.',
];
var lf=-1;
function SFF(){var i;do{i=Math.floor(Math.random()*ROBOT_FACTS.length);}while(i===lf);lf=i;var _rbt=document.getElementById('rbt');if(_rbt)_rbt.innerHTML=ROBOT_FACTS[i];var _rb1=document.getElementById('rb');if(_rb1)_rb1.classList.add('show');}
function CRB(){var _rb2=document.getElementById('rb');if(_rb2)_rb2.classList.remove('show');}


// ══ TAC SCANNER ══
var tacRunning = false;
var tacAC = null;

function startTAC() {
  if(tacRunning) return;
  tacRunning = true;
  document.getElementById('screen-idle').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('screen-scanning').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('screen-scanning').style.flexDirection = 'column';
  document.getElementById('screen-scanning').style.alignItems = 'center';
  document.getElementById('tac-ring').classList.add('scanning');
  
  // Animate person sliding into tunnel
  var person = document.getElementById('tac-person');
  if(person) { person.style.transition='transform 2s ease'; person.style.transform='translateX(-50%) translateX(-30px)'; }
  
  // Sound effects
  playTacSounds();
  
  // Progress bar
  var pct = 0;
  var bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
  var pctEl = document.getElementById('scan-pct');
  var statusEl = document.getElementById('scan-status');
  var statuses = [
    'CALIBRAZIONE MAGNETE...',
    'RILEVAMENTO PAZIENTE...',
    'SCANSIONE ASSIALE 1/4...',
    'SCANSIONE ASSIALE 2/4...',
    'SCANSIONE CORONALE...',
    'RICOSTRUZIONE 3D...',
    'ELABORAZIONE DATI...',
    'ANALISI COMPLETATA.'
  ];
  var interval = setInterval(function() {
    pct += 1;
    if(bar) bar.style.width = pct + '%';
    if(pctEl) pctEl.textContent = pct + '%';
    var si = Math.floor(pct / 13);
    if(statusEl && si < statuses.length) statusEl.textContent = statuses[si];
    if(pct >= 100) {
      clearInterval(interval);
      finishTAC();
    }
  }, 80);
}

function playTacSounds() {
  try {
    tacAC = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    var now = tacAC.currentTime;
    
    function beep(freq, start, dur, vol) {
      var o = tacAC.createOscillator();
      var g = tacAC.createGain();
      o.type = 'sine';
      o.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, now + start);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, now + start);
      g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(vol || 0.06, now + start + 0.02);
      g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + start + dur);
      o.connect(g); g.connect(tacAC.destination);
      o.start(now + start); o.stop(now + start + dur + 0.05);
    }
    
    function hum(freq, start, dur, vol) {
      var o = tacAC.createOscillator();
      var g = tacAC.createGain();
      o.type = 'sawtooth';
      o.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, now + start);
      o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(freq * 1.02, now + start + dur);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, now + start);
      g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(vol || 0.04, now + start + 0.1);
      g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + start + dur);
      o.connect(g); g.connect(tacAC.destination);
      o.start(now + start); o.stop(now + start + dur + 0.1);
    }
    
    // Machine startup hum
    hum(80, 0, 2, 0.05);
    hum(120, 0.5, 6, 0.04);
    // Scanning clicks / beeps
    for(var i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
      beep(800 + Math.random()*400, 1 + i*0.4, 0.05 + Math.random()*0.1, 0.03);
    }
    // Rotating machine sound
    hum(60, 1, 7, 0.06);
    hum(90, 1.5, 5, 0.03);
    // Completion beep
    beep(1200, 8.2, 0.1, 0.08);
    beep(1500, 8.35, 0.15, 0.08);
    beep(1800, 8.55, 0.2, 0.08);
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Audio not available:', e); }
}

function finishTAC() {
  document.getElementById('tac-ring').classList.remove('scanning');
  var person = document.getElementById('tac-person');
  if(person) { person.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)'; }
  setTimeout(function() {
    document.getElementById('screen-scanning').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('screen-done').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('screen-done').style.flexDirection = 'column';
    document.getElementById('screen-done').style.alignItems = 'center';
    tacRunning = false;
  }, 600);
}

function resetTAC() {
  tacRunning = false;
  if(tacAC) { try{tacAC.close();}catch(e){} tacAC=null; }
  document.getElementById('screen-done').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('screen-idle').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('screen-idle').style.flexDirection = 'column';
  document.getElementById('screen-idle').style.alignItems = 'center';
  var bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
  var pctEl = document.getElementById('scan-pct');
  if(bar) bar.style.width = '0%';
  if(pctEl) pctEl.textContent = '0%';
  var person = document.getElementById('tac-person');
  if(person) { person.style.transition='none'; person.style.transform='translateX(-50%)'; }
}

// Init quizzes
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){initQ1();});

function toggleNeuronMute(btn){if(!btn)return;window.__neuronMuted=!window.__neuronMuted;btn.innerHTML=window.__neuronMuted?'\ud83d\udd07 AUDIO OFF':'\ud83d\udd0a AUDIO ON';}


// ======== HAMBURGER MENU ========
function toggleMenu(){
  var btn=document.getElementById('menuBtn');
  var sm=document.getElementById('sideMenu');
  var ov=document.getElementById('sideMenuOverlay');
  if(btn)btn.classList.toggle('open');
  if(sm)sm.classList.toggle('open');
  if(ov)ov.classList.toggle('open');
}
function goToScreen(s){
  if(typeof toggleMenu==='function')toggleMenu();
  setTimeout(function(){
    blackFade(function(){
      // Remove active from ALL screens (not just first 5)
      document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(el){
        el.classList.remove('active');
      });
      var macbg=document.getElementById('macbg');
      if(macbg)macbg.classList.remove('show');
      // Stop melodies if playing
      if(typeof stopMelody==='function')try{stopMelody();}catch(e){}
      // Reset cur part for going back
      if(s==='intro'){
        curPart=0;
        var el=document.getElementById('scIntro');if(el)el.classList.add('active');
        if(typeof updateHUD==='function')updateHUD();
      }
      else if(s==='p1'){curPart=1;var el=document.getElementById('scP1');if(el){el.classList.add('active');el.scrollTop=0;}RV('scP1');if(typeof updateHUD==='function')updateHUD();}
      else if(s==='p2'){curPart=2;var el=document.getElementById('scP2');if(el){el.classList.add('active');el.scrollTop=0;}RV('scP2');if(typeof updateHUD==='function')updateHUD();}
      else if(s==='p3'){curPart=3;var el=document.getElementById('scP3');if(el){el.classList.add('active');el.scrollTop=0;}if(macbg)macbg.classList.add('show');RV('scP3');if(typeof updateHUD==='function')updateHUD();}
      else if(s==='p4'){goToP4();}
      else if(s==='p5'){goToP5();}
      else if(s==='p6'){goToP6();}
      else if(s==='p7'){goToP7();}
      else if(s==='p8'){goToP8();}
      else if(s==='p9'){goToP9();}
      else if(s==='p10'){goToP10();}
      else if(s==='p11'){goToP11();}
      else if(s==='p12'){goToP12();}
      else if(s==='p13'){goToP13();}
    });
  },300);
}

// ======== PART 4 TRANSITION ========
function goToP4(){
  var ov=document.getElementById('timeTravelOverlay');
  curPart=4;
  // Black screen then show overlay
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  // Hide all screens
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  var macbg=document.getElementById('macbg');if(macbg)macbg.classList.remove('show');

  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    if(ov)ov.classList.add('show');
    // Time travel audio
    try{
      var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
      function sw(f0,f1,s,d,t,v){t=t||'sine';v=v||.05;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+.1);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
      function tn(f,s,d,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.05,now+s+.05);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
      sw(2000,200,0,4,'sine',.07);sw(150,800,1,2,'triangle',.04);
      for(var i=0;i<10;i++)tn(800-i*60,.5+i*.4,.08,.04);
      sw(60,1500,4,1,'sine',.06);tn(1200,5,.3,.08);
    }catch(e){}
    // Animate timeline
    var dateEl=document.getElementById('ttDate');
    var bar=document.getElementById('ttBar');var dot=document.getElementById('ttDot');
    var t0=performance.now();var dur=4500;
    setTimeout(function(){if(bar)bar.style.width='100%';if(dot)dot.style.left='100%';},100);
    function tick(){var p=Math.min((performance.now()-t0)/dur,1);
      if(dateEl)dateEl.textContent=Math.round(2026+(1856-2026)*p);
      if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(tick);}tick();
    // Cloud canvas - clouds float everywhere AND converge to cover robot
    var cv=document.getElementById('ttCanvas');
    if(cv){var ccx=cv.getContext('2d');function rs(){cv.width=innerWidth;cv.height=innerHeight;}rs();
      var clouds=[],cl=true;
      var robEl=document.getElementById('ttRobot');
      var robCX=innerWidth/2, robCY=innerHeight*0.62; // robot approx center
      // Background drifting clouds
      for(var i=0;i<18;i++)clouds.push({
        x:Math.random()*cv.width,y:Math.random()*cv.height,
        r:35+Math.random()*70,vx:.3+Math.random()*1.2,a:.12+Math.random()*.3,
        covering:false
      });
      // Covering clouds start off-screen and converge on robot after 2s
      var coverClouds=[];
      for(var j=0;j<8;j++){
        var angle=j*(Math.PI*2/8);
        coverClouds.push({
          x:robCX+Math.cos(angle)*(cv.width*.7),
          y:robCY+Math.sin(angle)*(cv.height*.7),
          tx:robCX+(Math.random()-.5)*80,
          ty:robCY+(Math.random()-.5)*80,
          r:0, maxR:90+Math.random()*60,
          a:0, maxA:.55+Math.random()*.2,
          phase:0 // 0=waiting, 1=converging, 2=covering
        });
      }
      var coverStarted=false;
      function dc(){if(!cl)return;
        ccx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
        // Vortex bg
        var g=ccx.createRadialGradient(cv.width/2,cv.height/2,0,cv.width/2,cv.height/2,cv.width*.6);
        g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,.65)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,.94)');
        ccx.fillStyle=g;ccx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
        // Background drifting clouds
        clouds.forEach(function(c){c.x+=c.vx;if(c.x>cv.width+130)c.x=-130;
          var cg=ccx.createRadialGradient(c.x,c.y,0,c.x,c.y,c.r);
          cg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(180,190,200,'+c.a+')');cg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
          ccx.fillStyle=cg;ccx.beginPath();ccx.arc(c.x,c.y,c.r,0,Math.PI*2);ccx.fill();
        });
        // Covering clouds converge on robot
        coverClouds.forEach(function(c){
          if(c.phase===1){
            c.x+=(c.tx-c.x)*.04;c.y+=(c.ty-c.y)*.04;
            c.r=Math.min(c.maxR,c.r+1.2);c.a=Math.min(c.maxA,c.a+.008);
          }
          if(c.r>0){
            var cg=ccx.createRadialGradient(c.x,c.y,0,c.x,c.y,c.r);
            cg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(210,215,225,'+c.a+')');cg.addColorStop(.6,'rgba(150,160,175,'+(c.a*.5)+')');cg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
            ccx.fillStyle=cg;ccx.beginPath();ccx.arc(c.x,c.y,c.r,0,Math.PI*2);ccx.fill();
          }
        });
        requestAnimationFrame(dc);}dc();
      // Start converging after 2 seconds
      setTimeout(function(){
        coverClouds.forEach(function(c){c.phase=1;});
        // When covered, swap robot SVG to vintage style
        setTimeout(function(){
          if(robEl){
            robEl.innerHTML='<svg viewBox="0 0 100 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="110">'
              +'<line x1="50" y1="8" x2="50" y2="20" stroke="#8b7355" stroke-width="3"/>'
              +'<circle cx="50" cy="6" r="5" fill="#6b5a35" stroke="#4a3a20" stroke-width="1.5"/>'
              +'<rect x="15" y="20" width="70" height="55" rx="5" fill="#3d2b1a" stroke="#6b5a35" stroke-width="2.5"/>'
              +'<rect x="22" y="28" width="56" height="35" rx="3" fill="#2a1a0a"/>'
              +'<rect x="26" y="32" width="22" height="14" rx="2" fill="#1a0f00" stroke="#8b7355" stroke-width="1"/>'
              +'<circle cx="37" cy="39" r="5" fill="#8b1a00" opacity=".9"/>'
              +'<rect x="52" y="32" width="22" height="14" rx="2" fill="#1a0f00" stroke="#8b7355" stroke-width="1"/>'
              +'<circle cx="63" cy="39" r="5" fill="#8b1a00" opacity=".9"/>'
              +'<rect x="30" y="51" width="40" height="6" rx="1" fill="#4a3020" stroke="#6b5a35" stroke-width="1"/>'
              +'<rect x="8" y="34" width="8" height="18" rx="2" fill="#2a1a0a" stroke="#6b5a35" stroke-width="1.5"/>'
              +'<rect x="84" y="34" width="8" height="18" rx="2" fill="#2a1a0a" stroke="#6b5a35" stroke-width="1.5"/>'
              +'<rect x="38" y="75" width="24" height="10" rx="2" fill="#2a1a0a" stroke="#4a3020" stroke-width="1"/>'
              +'<rect x="20" y="85" width="60" height="40" rx="6" fill="#1a0f00" stroke="#4a3020" stroke-width="2"/>'
              +'<rect x="28" y="93" width="44" height="24" rx="3" fill="#110a00"/>'
              +'<circle cx="40" cy="103" r="5" fill="#8b1a00"/>'
              +'<circle cx="50" cy="103" r="5" fill="#6b5a35"/>'
              +'<circle cx="60" cy="103" r="5" fill="#8b1a00"/>'
              +'<rect x="28" y="118" width="14" height="7" rx="2" fill="#4a3020"/>'
              +'<rect x="58" y="118" width="14" height="7" rx="2" fill="#4a3020"/>'
              +'</svg>';
            robEl.style.filter='sepia(1) contrast(1.1) brightness(.85)';
          }
        },2200);
      },2000);
      setTimeout(function(){cl=false;},5800);}
  },4000);

  // After time travel: show scP4 with B&W film style
  setTimeout(function(){
    if(ov)ov.classList.remove('show');
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP4');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    // Show STORIA title then disappear, then show RIVOLUZIONE then disappear
    // Create title elements dynamically - more reliable than HTML state
    var st=document.createElement('div');
    st.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    st.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5em;color:rgba(255,220,150,.85);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,200,100,.6);">QUARTA PARTE</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,9vw,6.5rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 50px #fff,0 0 100px rgba(255,200,100,.5);letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1;">STORIA</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(st);
    setTimeout(function(){st.style.opacity='1';},100);
    // Fade out after 2.5s
    setTimeout(function(){st.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(st.parentNode)st.parentNode.removeChild(st);
        // Show second title
        var rv=document.createElement('div');
        rv.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.9rem,3vw,2.2rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 30px #fff,0 0 60px rgba(255,200,100,.5);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;text-align:center;line-height:1.6;max-width:88vw;';
        rv.innerHTML='LE ORIGINI:<br>LA SECONDA RIVOLUZIONE INDUSTRIALE';
        document.body.appendChild(rv);
        setTimeout(function(){rv.style.opacity='1';},100);
        setTimeout(function(){rv.style.opacity='0';
          setTimeout(function(){if(rv.parentNode)rv.parentNode.removeChild(rv);},800);
        },2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP4');initQ4();initSteamEngine();
  },6200);
}

// ======== STEAM ENGINE ========
var valveAngle=0,valveDragging=false,valveLastAngle=0,valveSpeed=0;
var steamAC=null,steamLastSound=0;
function startValveDrag(e){
  e.preventDefault();valveDragging=true;
  var w=document.getElementById('valveWheel');if(!w)return;
  var rect=w.getBoundingClientRect();var cx=rect.left+rect.width/2;var cy=rect.top+rect.height/2;
  var pt=e.touches?e.touches[0]:e;valveLastAngle=Math.atan2(pt.clientY-cy,pt.clientX-cx);
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',valveMove);document.addEventListener('touchmove',valveMove,{passive:false});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',endValveDrag);document.addEventListener('touchend',endValveDrag);
}
function valveMove(e){
  if(!valveDragging)return;e.preventDefault();
  var w=document.getElementById('valveWheel');if(!w)return;
  var rect=w.getBoundingClientRect();var cx=rect.left+rect.width/2;var cy=rect.top+rect.height/2;
  var pt=e.touches?e.touches[0]:e;var ang=Math.atan2(pt.clientY-cy,pt.clientX-cx);
  var diff=ang-valveLastAngle;if(diff>Math.PI)diff-=Math.PI*2;if(diff<-Math.PI)diff+=Math.PI*2;
  valveAngle+=diff*180/Math.PI;valveLastAngle=ang;
  w.style.transform='rotate('+valveAngle+'deg)';
  valveSpeed=Math.min(100,valveSpeed+Math.abs(diff)*35);
  updateSteam();
  var now2=Date.now();if(now2-steamLastSound>120){playSteamSound();steamLastSound=now2;}
}
function endValveDrag(){valveDragging=false;document.removeEventListener('mousemove',valveMove);document.removeEventListener('touchmove',valveMove);document.removeEventListener('mouseup',endValveDrag);document.removeEventListener('touchend',endValveDrag);}
function updateSteam(){
  var sv=document.getElementById('speedVal');if(sv)sv.textContent=Math.round(valveSpeed*10);
  var b=document.getElementById('boiler');if(b){if(valveSpeed>5)b.classList.add('boiler-active');else b.classList.remove('boiler-active');}
  var dur=Math.max(.3,5-valveSpeed*.045);
  ['gear1','gear2','gear3'].forEach(function(id){var g=document.getElementById(id);if(g){g.style.animationDuration=dur+'s';g.style.animationPlayState=valveSpeed>5?'running':'paused';}});
  var ph=document.getElementById('pistonHead');if(ph){ph.style.animationDuration=Math.max(.2,1.2-valveSpeed*.01)+'s';ph.style.animationPlayState=valveSpeed>5?'running':'paused';}
  var n=document.getElementById('gaugeNeedle');if(n)n.style.transform='rotate('+(-90+valveSpeed*1.8)+'deg)';
  var w=document.getElementById('valveWheel');if(w){if(valveSpeed>20)w.classList.add('spinning');else w.classList.remove('spinning');}
  document.querySelectorAll('.flame').forEach(function(f){f.style.transform='scaleY('+(1+valveSpeed*.015)+')';});
  if(!valveDragging){setTimeout(function(){valveSpeed=Math.max(0,valveSpeed-2);if(valveSpeed>0)updateSteam();},200);}
}
function playSteamSound(){
  try{if(!steamAC)steamAC=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
    var ac=steamAC;var t=ac.currentTime;
    var nb=ac.createBufferSource();var b=ac.createBuffer(1,ac.sampleRate*.15,ac.sampleRate);var d=b.getChannelData(0);
    for(var k=0;k<d.length;k++)d[k]=(Math.random()*2-1)*Math.pow(1-k/d.length,1.2);nb.buffer=b;
    var fil=ac.createBiquadFilter();fil.type='highpass';fil.frequency.value=1500;
    var g=ac.createGain();g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,t);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(.04,t+.02);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.0001,t+.15);
    nb.connect(fil);fil.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);nb.start(t);
    var o=ac.createOscillator();o.type='triangle';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(80+Math.random()*40,t);o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(40,t+.1);
    var og=ac.createGain();og.gain.setValueAtTime(.05,t);og.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.0001,t+.12);
    o.connect(og);og.connect(ac.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+.13);
  }catch(e){}
}
function initSteamEngine(){
  ['gear1','gear2','gear3'].forEach(function(id){var g=document.getElementById(id);if(g)g.style.animationPlayState='paused';});
  updateSteam();
}

// ======== QUIZ 4 ========
var Q4=[
  {q:'Quando inizia la Seconda Rivoluzione Industriale?',o:['1750','1856','1900','1914'],a:1,e:'1856! Anno del processo Bessemer per produrre acciaio in massa.'},
  {q:'Chi ha inventato la lampadina elettrica?',o:['Tesla','Edison','Bell','Marconi'],a:1,e:'Thomas Edison! Brevett\u00f2 la lampadina nel 1879.'},
  {q:'Chi ha brevettato il telefono nel 1876?',o:['Edison','Bell','Tesla','Ford'],a:1,e:'Alexander Graham Bell nel 1876.'},
  {q:'Chi rivoluzion\u00f2 la produzione con la catena di montaggio?',o:['Benz','Diesel','Ford','Daimler'],a:2,e:'Henry Ford con la catena di montaggio (1908).'},
  {q:'Cosa hanno inventato i fratelli Wright?',o:['Aeroplano','Sottomarino','Auto','Treno'],a:0,e:'Aeroplano! Primo volo il 17 dicembre 1903.'}
];
var q4i=0,q4s=0;
function initQ4(){q4i=0;q4s=0;showQ4();}
function showQ4(){
  if(q4i>=Q4.length){endQ('qb4','#',q4s,Q4.length,'initQ4');return;}
  var q=Q4[q4i];
  var t=document.getElementById('q4t');if(t)t.textContent='Domanda '+(q4i+1)+'/'+Q4.length+': '+q.q;
  var el=document.getElementById('q4o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';
  q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ4(i);};el.appendChild(b);});
  var f=document.getElementById('q4f');if(f)f.className='qfb';
  var n=document.getElementById('q4n');if(n)n.className='qnx';
}
function ansQ4(i){
  var q=Q4[q4i];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#q4o .qo');
  opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});
  var fb=document.getElementById('q4f');
  if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');q4s++;if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}}
  else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}}
  var n=document.getElementById('q4n');if(n)n.className='qnx show';
}
function nxQ4(){q4i++;showQ4();}

// ======== ADD STORIA POPUPS TO MD ========
MD.edison={ico:'\u2728',tag:'INVENTORE',h:'Thomas Edison',b:'<p><strong>Thomas Edison (1847-1931)</strong> brevett\u00f2 oltre 1.000 invenzioni:</p><ul><li>Lampadina (1879)</li><li>Fonografo (1877)</li><li>Cinema Kinetoscope (1891)</li><li>Centrale elettrica di Pearl Street (1882)</li></ul>'};
MD.ford={ico:'\u2699',tag:'INDUSTRIALE',h:'Henry Ford',b:'<p><strong>Henry Ford (1863-1947)</strong> rivoluzion\u00f2 la produzione con la <strong>catena di montaggio</strong> nel 1908.</p><ul><li>Produzione ridotta da 12 ore a 90 minuti</li><li>Salario operai: 5$/giorno</li><li>15 milioni di Model T vendute</li></ul>'};
MD.tesla={ico:'\u26a1',tag:'GENIO',h:'Nikola Tesla',b:'<p><strong>Nikola Tesla (1856-1943)</strong> invent\u00f2 la <strong>corrente alternata (AC)</strong>.</p><ul><li>Motore a induzione AC</li><li>Trasformatore di corrente</li><li>Bobina di Tesla per trasmissione wireless</li></ul>'};
MD.catena={ico:'\u2692',tag:'INDUSTRIA',h:'La Fabbrica Moderna',b:'<p>La <strong>catena di montaggio</strong> ha trasformato il lavoro.</p><ul><li>Pi\u00f9 efficienza, meno costi</li><li>Operai specializzati</li><li>Nascita della classe operaia urbana</li><li>Prime grandi citt\u00e0 industriali</li></ul>'};
MD.societa={ico:'\u263a',tag:'SOCIET\u00c0',h:'Cambiamenti Sociali',b:'<p>La Seconda Rivoluzione cambi\u00f2 la societ\u00e0:</p><ul><li><strong>Urbanizzazione</strong></li><li><strong>Sindacati</strong> e diritti operai</li><li><strong>Scuola dell\u2019obbligo</strong></li><li><strong>Donne nelle fabbriche</strong></li></ul>'};
MD.guerra={ico:'\u2694',tag:'WWI',h:'La Prima Guerra Mondiale',b:'<p>La Seconda Rivoluzione termina con la <strong>WWI (1914-1918)</strong>:</p><ul><li>Mitragliatrici, carri armati, aerei</li><li>Gas tossici e armi chimiche</li><li>Sottomarini e radio militari</li><li>16 milioni di morti</li></ul>'};

// ======== ADD STORIA FUN FACTS ========
ROBOT_FACTS.push('La <strong>Ford Model T</strong> era prodotta solo in nero perch\u00e9 era la vernice che asciugava pi\u00f9 velocemente!');
ROBOT_FACTS.push('Edison aveva <strong>1.093 brevetti</strong> \u2014 il record per un singolo inventore!');
ROBOT_FACTS.push('Tesla parlava <strong>8 lingue</strong> e aveva una memoria fotografica leggendaria.');
ROBOT_FACTS.push('Il primo film dei Lumi\u00e8re durava <strong>solo 50 secondi</strong>: operai che escono dalla fabbrica.');
ROBOT_FACTS.push('Bell scopr\u00ec il telefono per caso: stava migliorando il telegrafo!');

function togTL(el){
  var parent=el.parentElement;
  if(!parent)return;
  parent.querySelectorAll('.ti').forEach(function(i){if(i!==el)i.classList.remove('act');});
  el.classList.toggle('act');
}

// ======== NOTEBOOK ========
var nbCurrent=0, nbTotal=5;
function nbGo(dir){
  var cur=document.getElementById('nbp'+nbCurrent);
  if(cur)cur.classList.remove('active');
  nbCurrent=Math.max(0,Math.min(nbTotal,nbCurrent+dir));
  var nxt=document.getElementById('nbp'+nbCurrent);
  if(nxt)nxt.classList.add('active');
  var prev=document.getElementById('nbPrev');
  var next=document.getElementById('nbNext');
  var pnum=document.getElementById('nbPageNum');
  if(prev)prev.disabled=(nbCurrent===0);
  if(next)next.disabled=(nbCurrent>=nbTotal);
  if(pnum)pnum.textContent=nbCurrent===0?'Copertina / '+nbTotal:'Pagina '+nbCurrent+' / '+nbTotal;
}

// ======== PART 5 TRANSITION ========
function goToP5(){
  curPart=5;
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3','scP4'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  // Transition audio - literary/romantic
  try{
    var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
    function sw(f0,f1,s,d,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type='sine';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.05,now+s+.1);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    sw(440,880,0,2,.04);sw(880,440,1.5,2,.03);sw(660,330,3,1.5,.04);sw(330,660,4,1,.03);
  }catch(e){}

  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP5');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    // Show QUINTA PARTE - ITALIANO
    var d1=document.createElement('div');
    d1.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    d1.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:.5em;color:rgba(100,50,0,.9);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;font-style:italic;">Quinta Parte</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,9vw,6rem);font-weight:900;color:#3a1a00;text-shadow:2px 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 0 40px rgba(180,100,0,.4);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;">ITALIANO</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(d1);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='1';},80);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){if(d1.parentNode)d1.parentNode.removeChild(d1);
        var d2=document.createElement('div');
        d2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;max-width:88vw;';
        d2.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(.9rem,3vw,2rem);font-weight:bold;color:#3a1a00;text-shadow:1px 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2);letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;">Manoscritti e Poesie<br><span style=\"font-size:.7em;font-weight:400\">di Leonardo da Vinci</span></div>';
        document.body.appendChild(d2);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='1';},80);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){if(d2.parentNode)d2.parentNode.removeChild(d2);},800);},2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP5');initQ5();
  },4000);
}

// ======== QUIZ 5 ========
var Q5=[
  {q:'In quale anno nacque Leonardo da Vinci?',o:['1400','1452','1500','1519'],a:1,e:'1452! Nato ad Anchiano, vicino Vinci (Toscana), il 15 aprile 1452.'},
  {q:'Come scriveva Leonardo nei suoi manoscritti?',o:['In latino','Al contrario (speculare)','In greco','Con codici cifrati'],a:1,e:'Scriveva da destra a sinistra in modo speculare. Per leggerlo serve uno specchio!'},
  {q:'Chi ha acquistato il Codice Leicester nel 1994?',o:['Elon Musk','Jeff Bezos','Bill Gates','Steve Jobs'],a:2,e:'Bill Gates lo acquist\u00f2 per 30 milioni di dollari nel 1994.'},
  {q:'Quale principio fisico usa la catapulta?',o:['Magneti','Leva e contrappeso','Pressione idraulica','Forza centrifuga'],a:1,e:'Leva di secondo grado + contrappeso: l\'energia potenziale si trasforma in cinetica!'},
  {q:'Quante pagine di manoscritti di Leonardo sono sopravvissute?',o:['Circa 500','Circa 2.000','Circa 7.000','Circa 15.000'],a:2,e:'Circa 7.000 pagine! Ma si stima che originariamente fossero oltre 13.000.'}
];
var q5i=0,q5s=0;
function initQ5(){q5i=0;q5s=0;showQ5();}
function showQ5(){
  if(q5i>=Q5.length){endQ('qb5','\u270f',q5s,Q5.length,'initQ5');return;}
  var q=Q5[q5i];
  var t=document.getElementById('q5t');if(t)t.textContent='Domanda '+(q5i+1)+'/'+Q5.length+': '+q.q;
  var el=document.getElementById('q5o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';
  q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ5(i);};el.appendChild(b);});
  var f=document.getElementById('q5f');if(f)f.className='qfb';
  var n=document.getElementById('q5n');if(n)n.className='qnx';
}
function ansQ5(i){
  var q=Q5[q5i];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#q5o .qo');
  opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});
  var fb=document.getElementById('q5f');
  if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');q5s++;if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}}
  else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}}
  var n=document.getElementById('q5n');if(n)n.className='qnx show';
}
function nxQ5(){q5i++;showQ5();}

// ======== DA VINCI POPUPS ========
MD.vinci_vita={ico:'\u2602',tag:'VITA',h:'Leonardo da Vinci — La Vita',b:'<p><strong>Leonardo da Vinci (1452-1519)</strong> nacque figlio illegittimo di un notaio. Apprendista a Firenze nello studio di Verrocchio, divenne il pi\u00f9 grande genio del Rinascimento.</p><ul><li>1482: si trasfer\u00ec a Milano al servizio di Ludovico il Moro</li><li>1503: dipinse la Gioconda</li><li>1516: invitato da Francesco I di Francia a Amboise</li><li>Mori\'il 2 maggio 1519 tra le braccia del re di Francia</li></ul>'};
MD.vinci_arte={ico:'\u1f3a8',tag:'ARTE',h:'Le Opere d\'Arte',b:'<p>Leonardo ha creato alcune delle opere pi\u00f9 famose della storia dell\'arte:</p><ul><li><strong>La Gioconda</strong> (1503-1519) — il dipinto pi\u00f9 famoso del mondo</li><li><strong>L\'Ultima Cena</strong> (1494-1498) — affresco a Milano</li><li><strong>L\'Uomo Vitruviano</strong> (1490) — proporzioni ideali del corpo umano</li><li><strong>La Vergine delle Rocce</strong> (1483-1486)</li></ul>'};
MD.vinci_invenzioni={ico:'\u2699',tag:'INVENZIONI',h:'Le Invenzioni di Leonardo',b:'<p>Leonardo prog\u00e8tt\u00f2 macchine che anticiparono il futuro di secoli:</p><ul><li><strong>Elicottero:</strong> vite aerea, 1489</li><li><strong>Carro armato:</strong> veicolo corazzato rotondo, 1487</li><li><strong>Paracadute</strong> e aliante, 1485</li><li><strong>Robot:</strong> cavaliere meccanico in armatura, 1495</li><li><strong>Bicicletta</strong> (schizzo trovato nel 1974)</li><li><strong>Occhiali da sole</strong> e lenti progressive</li></ul>'};
MD.vinci_codici={ico:'\u1f4d6',tag:'CODICI',h:'I Codici Manoscritti',b:'<p>Leonardo lasc\u00ec migliaia di pagine di manoscritti chiamati "codici":</p><ul><li><strong>Codice Atlantico:</strong> 1.119 pagine, il pi\u00f9 grande</li><li><strong>Codice Leicester:</strong> acquistato da Bill Gates per 30 mil$</li><li><strong>Codice sul Volo degli Uccelli:</strong> 84 pagine</li><li><strong>Codice Windsor:</strong> 600 disegni anatomici e paesaggi</li><li>Scritti in <em>scrittura speculare</em> da destra a sinistra</li></ul>'};
MD.vinci_poesie={ico:'\u270f',tag:'POESIE E AFORISMI',h:'Le Parole di Leonardo',b:'<p>Leonardo scrisse favole, aforismi e riflessioni filosofiche:</p><ul><li><em>"L\'occhio \u00e8 la finestra dell\'anima"</em></li><li><em>"L\'acqua \u00e8 il sangue della terra"</em></li><li><em>"Chi poco pensa, molto erra"</em></li><li><em>"Il ferro si arruginisce senza uso, l\'acqua stagnante marcisce... cos\u00ec l\'ingegno senza esercizio"</em></li><li><em>"La semplicità \u00e8 la massima sofisticazione"</em></li></ul>'};
MD.vinci_legenda={ico:'\u2728',tag:'LEGGENDE',h:'I Misteri di Leonardo',b:'<p>Attorno a Leonardo si sono formate molte leggende:</p><ul><li>La <strong>Gioconda</strong>: chi \u00e8 davvero? Forse un autoritratto femminile?</li><li>Era <strong>mancino e ambidestro</strong>: scriveva con la sinistra, disegnava con entrambe</li><li>Si dice dormisse <strong>15 minuti ogni 4 ore</strong> (sonno polifasico)</li><li>Il <strong>Codice Da Vinci</strong> di Dan Brown ha creato leggende su sette segrete — tutte inventate</li><li>Non pubblic\u00f2 mai nulla: temeva che gli rubassero le idee</li></ul>'};

// goToScreen handles p5 via main function


// ======== PART 6: GEOGRAFIA ========
function goToP6(){
  curPart=6;
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3','scP4','scP5'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  // Transition audio: military/mechanical
  try{
    var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
    function tn(f,s,d,t,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t||'square';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.04,now+s+.05);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    [80,160,80,120,200].forEach(function(f,i){tn(f,i*.5,.4,'sawtooth',.05);});
