    tn(55,2.5,2,'triangle',.06);tn(110,3,.8,'square',.04);tn(220,3.5,.4,'square',.04);
  }catch(e){}

  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP6');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    // Title sequence
    var d1=document.createElement('div');
    d1.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    d1.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);color:rgba(0,255,65,.8);letter-spacing:.5em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">&gt; SESTA PARTE &lt;</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,6rem);font-weight:900;color:#00ff41;text-shadow:0 0 40px #00ff41,0 0 80px rgba(0,255,65,.4);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">GEOGRAFIA</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(d1);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='1';},80);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(d1.parentNode)d1.parentNode.removeChild(d1);
        var d2=document.createElement('div');
        d2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;max-width:88vw;';
        d2.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.85rem,2.5vw,1.8rem);color:#00ff41;text-shadow:0 0 20px #00ff41;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.7;">LA GERMANIA<br><span style=\"font-size:.75em;color:#00cc33\">e di come era gi\u00e0 un passo avanti<br>nella Seconda Guerra Mondiale</span></div>';
        document.body.appendChild(d2);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='1';},80);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){if(d2.parentNode)d2.parentNode.removeChild(d2);},800);},2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP6');initQ6();initRobot3D();
  },4000);
}

// ======== 3D ROBOT ENGINE ========
var robotBooted=false;
var rbRY=.4,rbRX=-.15,rbDrag=false,rbLX=0,rbLY=0;
var rbLimbs={larm:0,rarm:0,lleg:0,rleg:0,head:0}; // 0=rest 1=raised

function initRobot3D(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('robotCanvas');
  var wp=document.getElementById('robotCanvasWrap');
  if(!cv||!wp)return;
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  function resize(){cv.width=wp.offsetWidth||280;cv.height=wp.offsetHeight||350;}
  resize();
  try{new ResizeObserver(resize).observe(wp);}catch(e){}

  function P3(x,y,z){
    var cY=Math.cos(rbRY),sY=Math.sin(rbRY),cX=Math.cos(rbRX),sX=Math.sin(rbRX);
    var rx=x*cY+z*sY;var rz=-x*sY+z*cY;
    var ry=y*cX-rz*sX;var rz2=y*sX+rz*cX;
    var d=500/(500+rz2+350);
    return{x:cv.width/2+rx*d,y:cv.height/2+ry*d,d:d};
  }
  function BOX(cx2,cy,cz,w,h,d,col,lit){
    var c=col||'rgba(40,80,40,.9)';var hi=lit||'rgba(80,140,80,.9)';
    var pts=[
      P3(cx2-w,cy-h,cz-d),P3(cx2+w,cy-h,cz-d),
      P3(cx2+w,cy+h,cz-d),P3(cx2-w,cy+h,cz-d),
      P3(cx2-w,cy-h,cz+d),P3(cx2+w,cy-h,cz+d),
      P3(cx2+w,cy+h,cz+d),P3(cx2-w,cy+h,cz+d)
    ];
    function face(i0,i1,i2,i3,fc){
      cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(pts[i0].x,pts[i0].y);cx.lineTo(pts[i1].x,pts[i1].y);
      cx.lineTo(pts[i2].x,pts[i2].y);cx.lineTo(pts[i3].x,pts[i3].y);
      cx.closePath();cx.fillStyle=fc;cx.fill();
      cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,180,40,.5)';cx.lineWidth=.8;cx.stroke();
    }
    face(0,1,2,3,c);face(4,5,6,7,hi);face(0,4,7,3,c);face(1,5,6,2,c);face(0,1,5,4,hi);face(3,2,6,7,c);
  }
  function CYL3(ax,ay,az,bx,by,bz,r,col){
    var A=P3(ax,ay,az),B=P3(bx,by,bz);
    var dx=B.x-A.x,dy=B.y-A.y,L=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);if(L<1)return;
    var rad=r*(A.d+B.d)*.5*90;var px=-dy/L*rad,py=dx/L*rad;
    var g=cx.createLinearGradient(A.x-px,A.y-py,A.x+px,A.y+py);
    g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,80,0,.9)');g.addColorStop(.5,col||'rgba(30,100,30,.95)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,40,0,.9)');
    cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(A.x-px,A.y-py);cx.lineTo(B.x-px,B.y-py);cx.lineTo(B.x+px,B.y+py);cx.lineTo(A.x+px,A.y+py);
    cx.closePath();cx.fillStyle=g;cx.fill();cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,180,40,.4)';cx.lineWidth=.8;cx.stroke();
  }

  function DRAW3D(){
    cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    // bg
    var bg=cx.createRadialGradient(cv.width/2,cv.height/2,0,cv.width/2,cv.height/2,200);
    bg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,20,0,.4)');bg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    cx.fillStyle=bg;cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    // Grid
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,150,0,.12)';cx.lineWidth=.7;
    for(var gi=0;gi<8;gi++){var gy=-120+gi*35;var gl=P3(-80,80,gy),gr=P3(80,80,gy);cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(gl.x,gl.y);cx.lineTo(gr.x,gr.y);cx.stroke();}

    var col='rgba(40,90,40,.95)';var hi='rgba(70,140,70,.95)';
    if(!robotBooted){col='rgba(30,55,30,.8)';hi='rgba(50,80,50,.8)';}

    // Torso
    BOX(0,0,0,22,28,14,col,hi);
    // Head - with head rotation
    var ha=rbLimbs.head*.4;
    var hx=Math.sin(ha)*10,hz=Math.cos(ha)*10-10;
    BOX(hx,-38,hz,14,12,10,col,hi);
    // Eyes
    function eye(ex,ey,ez){var ep=P3(ex,ey,ez);cx.beginPath();cx.arc(ep.x,ep.y,4*ep.d,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fillStyle=robotBooted?'rgba(0,255,65,.9)':'rgba(0,80,40,.6)';cx.fill();if(robotBooted){cx.shadowBlur=10;cx.shadowColor='#00ff41';cx.fill();cx.shadowBlur=0;}}
    eye(hx-6,-33,hz-11);eye(hx+6,-33,hz-11);
    // Neck
    CYL3(0,-25,0,hx,-28,hz,.06,'rgba(40,90,40,.9)');
    // Left arm
    var la=rbLimbs.larm*.9;
    var lax=-22-Math.sin(la)*15,lay=Math.cos(la)*20-5;
    CYL3(-22,-5,0,lax,lay,0,.08,col);BOX(lax,lay+8,0,7,8,7,col,hi);
    // Right arm
    var ra=rbLimbs.rarm*.9;
    var rax=22+Math.sin(ra)*15,ray=Math.cos(ra)*20-5;
    CYL3(22,-5,0,rax,ray,0,.08,col);BOX(rax,ray+8,0,7,8,7,col,hi);
    // Left leg
    var ll=rbLimbs.lleg*.7;
    var lly=28+Math.cos(ll)*30,llz=Math.sin(ll)*15;
    CYL3(-10,28,0,-12,lly,llz,.09,col);BOX(-12,lly+10,llz,8,10,8,col,hi);
    // Right leg
    var rl=rbLimbs.rleg*.7;
    var rly=28+Math.cos(rl)*30,rlz=Math.sin(rl)*15;
    CYL3(10,28,0,12,rly,rlz,.09,col);BOX(12,rly+10,rlz,8,10,8,col,hi);

    // Status indicator on chest
    if(robotBooted){
      var cp=P3(0,-2,-15);cx.beginPath();cx.arc(cp.x,cp.y,5,0,Math.PI*2);
      var phase=(Date.now()%1200)/1200;
      cx.fillStyle='rgba(0,'+(Math.round(150+105*Math.sin(phase*Math.PI*2)))+',40,.9)';
      cx.fill();cx.shadowBlur=8;cx.shadowColor='#00ff41';cx.fill();cx.shadowBlur=0;
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(DRAW3D);
  }
  DRAW3D();

  // Drag
  wp.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){rbDrag=true;rbLX=e.clientX;rbLY=e.clientY;e.preventDefault();});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!rbDrag)return;rbRY+=(e.clientX-rbLX)*.014;rbRX+=(e.clientY-rbLY)*.012;rbLX=e.clientX;rbLY=e.clientY;});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){rbDrag=false;});
  wp.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){rbDrag=true;rbLX=e.touches[0].clientX;rbLY=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){if(!rbDrag)return;rbRY+=(e.touches[0].clientX-rbLX)*.014;rbRX+=(e.touches[0].clientY-rbLY)*.012;rbLX=e.touches[0].clientX;rbLY=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchend',function(){rbDrag=false;});
}

function bootRobot(){
  var btn=document.getElementById('termStartBtn');
  if(btn)btn.style.display='none';
  var bar=document.getElementById('termBar');var fill=document.getElementById('termBarFill');
  var stat=document.getElementById('termStatus');var done=document.getElementById('termDone');
  var cont=document.getElementById('termContent');
  if(bar)bar.style.display='block';
  // Boot messages
  var msgs=['> POWER ON...','> MOTOR INIT...','> SENSOR CHECK...','> GYRO CAL...','> WEAPON SAFE...','> BOOT OK'];
  var pct=0;
  var lines=[];
  var bootInt=setInterval(function(){
    pct+=2;
    if(fill)fill.style.width=pct+'%';
    var mi=Math.floor(pct/20);
    if(mi<msgs.length&&(!lines[mi])){lines[mi]=true;if(cont){var d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=msgs[mi];d.style.color='#00cc33';d.style.fontSize='.55rem';cont.appendChild(d);cont.scrollTop=cont.scrollHeight;}}
    if(stat)stat.textContent='LOADING... '+pct+'%';
    // Audio
    try{
      var ac=window._rbAC||(window._rbAC=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)());
      var t=ac.currentTime;var o=ac.createOscillator();var g=ac.createGain();
      o.type='square';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(400+pct*8,t);
      g.gain.setValueAtTime(.02,t);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.0001,t+.08);
      o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+.09);
    }catch(e){}
    if(pct>=100){
      clearInterval(bootInt);
      if(bar)bar.style.display='none';
      if(done)done.style.display='block';
      robotBooted=true;
      var ctrl=document.getElementById('robotControls');if(ctrl)ctrl.classList.add('show');
      // Completion sound
      try{
        var ac2=window._rbAC;var t2=ac2.currentTime;
        [440,660,880].forEach(function(f,i){var o=ac2.createOscillator(),g=ac2.createGain();o.type='sine';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,t2+i*.12);g.gain.setValueAtTime(.06,t2+i*.12);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,t2+i*.12+.3);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac2.destination);o.start(t2+i*.12);o.stop(t2+i*.12+.35);});
      }catch(e){}
    }
  },60);
}

var rbAnimFrames={};
function rCtrl(limb){
  if(!robotBooted){var s=document.getElementById('rStat');if(s)s.textContent='> OFFLINE - AVVIA PRIMA';return;}
  if(limb==='reset'){
    Object.keys(rbLimbs).forEach(function(k){rbLimbs[k]=0;});
    var s=document.getElementById('rStat');if(s)s.textContent='> RESET OK';
    document.querySelectorAll('.rcbtn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('act');});
    return;
  }
  // Toggle limb
  var target=rbLimbs[limb]>0.5?0:1;
  var start=rbLimbs[limb],t0=performance.now();
  var s=document.getElementById('rStat');if(s)s.textContent='> '+limb.toUpperCase()+': '+(target>0?'RAISED':'LOWERED');
  // Find and toggle button active state
  document.querySelectorAll('.rcbtn').forEach(function(b){if(b.textContent.toLowerCase().indexOf(limb.replace('arm','BRACCIO').replace('leg','GAMBA').replace('head','TESTA').toLowerCase())>=0)b.classList.toggle('act',target>0);});
  if(rbAnimFrames[limb])cancelAnimationFrame(rbAnimFrames[limb]);
  function step(now){
    var p=Math.min((now-t0)/500,1),e=p<.5?2*p*p:1-Math.pow(-2*p+2,2)/2;
    rbLimbs[limb]=start+(target-start)*e;
    if(p<1)rbAnimFrames[limb]=requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }
  rbAnimFrames[limb]=requestAnimationFrame(step);
  // Sound
  try{var ac=window._rbAC||(window._rbAC=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)());var t=ac.currentTime;var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type='sawtooth';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(200,t);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(80,t+.4);g.gain.setValueAtTime(.04,t);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,t+.5);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+.55);}catch(e){}
}

// ======== QUIZ 6 ========
var Q6=[
  {q:'Quale fu il primo missile balistico della storia?',o:['V-1','V-2','Scud','Polaris'],a:1,e:'V-2! Progettato da Wernher von Braun nel 1942. Il suo successore port\u00f2 l\'uomo sulla Luna.'},
  {q:'Quale fu il primo aereo a reazione in servizio operativo?',o:['Spitfire','B-29','Me 262','Hurricane'],a:2,e:'Messerschmitt Me 262 (1944): 870 km/h, anticip\u00f2 l\'era dei jet di almeno 10 anni.'},
  {q:'Chi riusc\u00ec a violare la macchina Enigma?',o:['Einstein','Churchill','Turing','Eisenhower'],a:2,e:'Alan Turing! Nel 1941 a Bletchley Park. Questa scoperta acceler\u00f2 la fine della guerra.'},
  {q:'Quanti scienziati tedeschi furono reclutati dagli USA dopo la guerra?',o:['100','500','1.600','5.000'],a:2,e:'1.600 scienziati! Programma "Paperclip". Von Braun fu tra i pi\u00f9 importanti.'},
  {q:'Quale carro armato tedesco era il pi\u00f9 temuto della WWII?',o:['Sherman','T-34','Tiger I','Churchill'],a:2,e:'Tiger I! Cannone da 88mm, corazza da 120mm. Richiedeva 3 Sherman per fermarne uno.'}
];
var q6i=0,q6s=0;
function initQ6(){q6i=0;q6s=0;showQ6();}
function showQ6(){
  if(q6i>=Q6.length){endQ('qb6','&#9632;',q6s,Q6.length,'initQ6');return;}
  var q=Q6[q6i];
  var t=document.getElementById('q6t');if(t)t.textContent='Domanda '+(q6i+1)+'/'+Q6.length+': '+q.q;
  var el=document.getElementById('q6o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';
  q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ6(i);};el.appendChild(b);});
  var f=document.getElementById('q6f');if(f)f.className='qfb';
  var n=document.getElementById('q6n');if(n)n.className='qnx';
}
function ansQ6(i){var q=Q6[q6i];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#q6o .qo');opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});var fb=document.getElementById('q6f');if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');q6s++;if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}}else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}}var n=document.getElementById('q6n');if(n)n.className='qnx show';}
function nxQ6(){q6i++;showQ6();}

// ======== GEOGRAFIA POPUPS ========
MD.de_razzo={ico:'&#128640;',tag:'V-2',h:'Il Razzo V-2',b:'<p>Il <strong>Vergeltungswaffe 2</strong> (V-2) fu il primo missile balistico della storia:</p><ul><li>Altezza: 14 metri, peso: 12.500 kg</li><li>Gittata: 320 km, velocit\u00e0: 5.400 km/h</li><li>Non poteva essere intercettato: arrivava a Mach 4</li><li>Colp\u00ec Londra e Anversa nel 1944-45</li><li>Wernher von Braun, il suo creatore, and\u00f2 poi alla NASA</li></ul>'};
MD.de_jet={ico:'&#9992;',tag:'ME 262',h:'Messerschmitt Me 262',b:'<p>Il <strong>Me 262 "Schwalbe"</strong> fu il primo aereo a reazione operativo della storia:</p><ul><li>Velocit\u00e0: 870 km/h (100 km/h in pi\u00f9 degli Spitfire)</li><li>Motori Junkers Jumo 004 a turbogetto</li><li>Se fosse entrato prima in servizio, avrebbe cambiato le sorti della guerra</li><li>Ispir\u00f2 il design di tutti i jet moderni</li></ul>'};
MD.de_enigma={ico:'&#128272;',tag:'ENIGMA',h:'La Macchina Enigma',b:'<p><strong>Enigma</strong> era una macchina per cifrare messaggi militari con rotori intercambiabili:</p><ul><li>158 quintilioni di combinazioni possibili</li><li>Alan Turing la viol\u00f2 a Bletchley Park con il computer "Bombe"</li><li>La violazione acceler\u00f2 la fine della guerra di 2-4 anni</li><li>Turing \u00e8 considerato il padre dell\'informatica moderna</li></ul>'};
MD.de_panzer={ico:'&#9881;',tag:'TIGER I',h:'Il Panzer Tiger I',b:'<p>Il <strong>Tiger I</strong> (1942) era il carro armato pi\u00f9 potente della WWII:</p><ul><li>Peso: 57 tonnellate</li><li>Cannone 88mm: poteva distruggere qualsiasi carro alleato</li><li>Corazza frontale da 120mm</li><li>Servivano 3-5 carri Sherman USA per fermarne uno</li><li>Prodotti solo 1.347 esemplari (troppo costosi)</li></ul>'};
MD.de_uboot={ico:'&#127700;',tag:'U-BOOT',h:'I Sottomarini U-Boot',b:'<p>Gli <strong>U-Boot</strong> tedeschi dominarono l\'Atlantico 1939-1943:</p><ul><li>Affondarono 3.000 navi mercantili alleate</li><li>Dotati di sonar, torpedini acustici guidati e propulsione silenziosa</li><li>La "Battaglia dell\'Atlantico" fu la campagna pi\u00f9 lunga della WWII</li><li>Nuovi U-Boot di Tipo XXI potevano restare sommersi settimane</li></ul>'};
MD.de_paperclip={ico:'&#9733;',tag:'PAPERCLIP',h:'Operazione Paperclip',b:'<p><strong>Operazione Paperclip</strong> (1945-1959): gli USA reclutarono 1.600 scienziati tedeschi:</p><ul><li>Wernher von Braun: progett\u00f2 Saturn V che port\u00f2 l\'uomo sulla Luna</li><li>Hubertus Strughold: fondatore della medicina spaziale</li><li>Walter Dornberger: guidò lo sviluppo dei razzi USA</li><li>L\'URSS fece lo stesso con l\'Operazione Osoaviakhim</li></ul>'};


// ======== PART 7: ARTE ========
function goToP7(){
  curPart=7;
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3','scP4','scP5','scP6'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  // Transition audio: creative/design feel
  try{
    var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
    function sw(f0,f1,s,d,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type='sine';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.05,now+s+.08);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    sw(300,600,0,2,'sine',.05);sw(600,900,1,1.5,.04);sw(900,1200,2,1,.05);sw(1200,800,3,.8,.04);sw(800,400,3.5,1,.03);
  }catch(e){}

  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP7');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    // Title sequence
    var d1=document.createElement('div');
    d1.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    d1.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);color:rgba(100,160,255,.85);letter-spacing:.5em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">&mdash; SETTIMA PARTE &mdash;</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,9vw,6.5rem);font-weight:900;color:#88bbff;text-shadow:0 0 40px #4488cc,0 0 80px rgba(100,160,255,.4);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;">ARTE</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(d1);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='1';},80);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(d1.parentNode)d1.parentNode.removeChild(d1);
        var d2=document.createElement('div');
        d2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;max-width:88vw;';
        d2.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.9rem,3vw,2rem);color:#88bbff;text-shadow:0 0 20px #4488cc;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.65;">I PROGETTI E LE BOZZE<br><span style=\"font-size:.72em;color:#668bcc;font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace\">della progettazione dei robot</span></div>';
        document.body.appendChild(d2);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='1';},80);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){if(d2.parentNode)d2.parentNode.removeChild(d2);},800);},2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP7');initQ7();initDrawCanvas();
  },4000);
}

// ======== DRAWING CANVAS ========
var drawTool='pen';var drawActive=false;var drawStartX=0,drawStartY=0;
var drawSnapshot=null;

function initDrawCanvas(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('drawCanvas');
  if(!cv)return;
  var wrap=document.getElementById('drawCanvasWrap');
  cv.width=wrap.offsetWidth||600;cv.height=500;
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  // White background with light blue tint
  cx.fillStyle='#f0f4ff';cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
  // Draw blueprint grid lightly
  cx.strokeStyle='rgba(100,160,220,.15)';cx.lineWidth=.8;
  for(var gx=0;gx<cv.width;gx+=40){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(gx,0);cx.lineTo(gx,cv.height);cx.stroke();}
  for(var gy=0;gy<cv.height;gy+=40){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(0,gy);cx.lineTo(cv.width,gy);cx.stroke();}
  // Corner marks
  cx.strokeStyle='rgba(60,120,200,.4)';cx.lineWidth=1.5;
  [[10,10,30,10],[10,10,10,30],[cv.width-10,10,cv.width-30,10],[cv.width-10,10,cv.width-10,30],
   [10,cv.height-10,30,cv.height-10],[10,cv.height-10,10,cv.height-30],
   [cv.width-10,cv.height-10,cv.width-30,cv.height-10],[cv.width-10,cv.height-10,cv.width-10,cv.height-30]
  ].forEach(function(l){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(l[0],l[1]);cx.lineTo(l[2],l[3]);cx.stroke();});
  // Title watermark
  cx.font='bold 11px Share Tech Mono,monospace';cx.fillStyle='rgba(60,120,200,.2)';cx.textAlign='center';
  cx.fillText('TAVOLA DI PROGETTO — CHRISTIAN CARUSO',cv.width/2,cv.height-10);
  cx.textAlign='left';

  function getPos(e){
    var r=cv.getBoundingClientRect();
    var scaleX=cv.width/r.width;var scaleY=cv.height/r.height;
    var clientX=e.touches?e.touches[0].clientX:e.clientX;
    var clientY=e.touches?e.touches[0].clientY:e.clientY;
    return{x:(clientX-r.left)*scaleX,y:(clientY-r.top)*scaleY};
  }
  function getColor(){return document.getElementById('colorPicker').value||'#1a3a8a';}
  function getSize(){return parseInt(document.getElementById('strokeSize').value)||2;}
  function updateStatus(){
    var s=document.getElementById('drawStatus');
    if(s)s.textContent='> STRUMENTO: '+drawTool.toUpperCase()+' | COLORE: '+getColor()+' | SPESSORE: '+getSize()+'px';}

  cv.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){
    drawActive=true;
    var p=getPos(e);drawStartX=p.x;drawStartY=p.y;
    drawSnapshot=cx.getImageData(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    if(drawTool==='pen'||drawTool==='erase'){
      cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);
    }
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
    if(!drawActive)return;
    var p=getPos(e);
    if(drawTool==='pen'){
      cx.strokeStyle=getColor();cx.lineWidth=getSize();cx.lineCap='round';cx.lineJoin='round';
      cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();
    } else if(drawTool==='erase'){
      cx.strokeStyle='#f0f4ff';cx.lineWidth=getSize()*4;cx.lineCap='round';
      cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();
    } else {
      cx.putImageData(drawSnapshot,0,0);
      cx.strokeStyle=getColor();cx.lineWidth=getSize();
      if(drawTool==='line'){
        cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(drawStartX,drawStartY);cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();
      } else if(drawTool==='rect'){
        cx.strokeRect(drawStartX,drawStartY,p.x-drawStartX,p.y-drawStartY);
      } else if(drawTool==='circle'){
        var r2=Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x-drawStartX,2)+Math.pow(p.y-drawStartY,2));
        cx.beginPath();cx.arc(drawStartX,drawStartY,r2,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();
      }
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){drawActive=false;drawSnapshot=null;});
  cv.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){
    drawActive=true;var p=getPos(e);drawStartX=p.x;drawStartY=p.y;
    drawSnapshot=cx.getImageData(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    if(drawTool==='pen'||drawTool==='erase'){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);}
    e.preventDefault();
  },{passive:false});
  cv.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){
    if(!drawActive)return;var p=getPos(e);
    if(drawTool==='pen'){cx.strokeStyle=getColor();cx.lineWidth=getSize();cx.lineCap='round';cx.lineJoin='round';cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();}
    else if(drawTool==='erase'){cx.strokeStyle='#f0f4ff';cx.lineWidth=getSize()*4;cx.lineCap='round';cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();}
    else{
      cx.putImageData(drawSnapshot,0,0);cx.strokeStyle=getColor();cx.lineWidth=getSize();
      if(drawTool==='line'){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(drawStartX,drawStartY);cx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);cx.stroke();}
      else if(drawTool==='rect'){cx.strokeRect(drawStartX,drawStartY,p.x-drawStartX,p.y-drawStartY);}
      else if(drawTool==='circle'){var r3=Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x-drawStartX,2)+Math.pow(p.y-drawStartY,2));cx.beginPath();cx.arc(drawStartX,drawStartY,r3,0,Math.PI*2);cx.stroke();}
    }
    e.preventDefault();
  },{passive:false});
  cv.addEventListener('touchend',function(){drawActive=false;drawSnapshot=null;});

  // Color/size change update status
  document.getElementById('colorPicker').addEventListener('input',updateStatus);
  document.getElementById('strokeSize').addEventListener('input',updateStatus);
  updateStatus();
  // Resize canvas on window resize
  try{new ResizeObserver(function(){
    var imgData=cx.getImageData(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    cv.width=wrap.offsetWidth||600;cx.putImageData(imgData,0,0);
  }).observe(wrap);}catch(e){}
}

function setTool(tool,btn){
  drawTool=tool;
  document.querySelectorAll('.dtbtn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');});
  if(btn)btn.classList.add('active');
  var cv=document.getElementById('drawCanvas');if(cv)cv.style.cursor=tool==='erase'?'cell':'crosshair';
  var s=document.getElementById('drawStatus');
  var c=document.getElementById('colorPicker');var sz=document.getElementById('strokeSize');
  if(s&&c&&sz)s.textContent='> STRUMENTO: '+tool.toUpperCase()+' | COLORE: '+c.value+' | SPESSORE: '+sz.value+'px';
}
function clearCanvas(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('drawCanvas');if(!cv)return;
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  cx.fillStyle='#f0f4ff';cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
  cx.strokeStyle='rgba(100,160,220,.15)';cx.lineWidth=.8;
  for(var gx=0;gx<cv.width;gx+=40){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(gx,0);cx.lineTo(gx,cv.height);cx.stroke();}
  for(var gy=0;gy<cv.height;gy+=40){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(0,gy);cx.lineTo(cv.width,gy);cx.stroke();}
  cx.font='bold 11px Share Tech Mono,monospace';cx.fillStyle='rgba(60,120,200,.2)';cx.textAlign='center';
  cx.fillText('TAVOLA DI PROGETTO — CHRISTIAN CARUSO',cv.width/2,cv.height-10);cx.textAlign='left';
}
function saveDrawing(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('drawCanvas');if(!cv)return;
  var link=document.createElement('a');
  link.download='progetto_robot.png';link.href=cv.toDataURL('image/png');link.click();
}

// ======== QUIZ 7 ========
var Q7=[
  {q:'Qual\u00e8 il primo passo nella progettazione di un robot?',o:['Coding','Schizzo concettuale','Stampa 3D','Analisi FEM'],a:1,e:'Lo schizzo concettuale! Ogni grande progetto inizia con un\'idea disegnata a mano.'},
  {q:'Cosa significa CAD?',o:['Computer Aided Design','Creative Art Drawing','Coded Assembly Device','Circuit Analysis Data'],a:0,e:'Computer Aided Design! Software come AutoCAD e SolidWorks per creare disegni tecnici.'},
  {q:'Cosa analizza la simulazione FEM?',o:['Il colore','I costi','Le forze e tensioni','La velocit\u00e0'],a:2,e:'Forze e tensioni! Permette di vedere dove potrebbe rompersi il pezzo prima di costruirlo.'},
  {q:'Quante iterazioni servono per un robot professionale?',o:['1-2','5-10','Decine','Centinaia'],a:3,e:'Centinaia! I migliori robot vengono rivisti e migliorati centinaia di volte prima del prodotto finale.'},
  {q:'Quale software si usa comunemente per la progettazione 3D di robot?',o:['Photoshop','SolidWorks','Excel','Minecraft'],a:1,e:'SolidWorks! Insieme ad AutoCAD e Fusion 360, \u00e8 tra i software CAD pi\u00f9 usati nell\'ingegneria robotica.'}
];
var q7i=0,q7s=0;
function initQ7(){q7i=0;q7s=0;showQ7();}
function showQ7(){
  if(q7i>=Q7.length){endQ('qb7','&#9998;',q7s,Q7.length,'initQ7');return;}
  var q=Q7[q7i];
  var t=document.getElementById('q7t');if(t)t.textContent='Domanda '+(q7i+1)+'/'+Q7.length+': '+q.q;
  var el=document.getElementById('q7o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';
  q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ7(i);};el.appendChild(b);});
  var f=document.getElementById('q7f');if(f)f.className='qfb';
  var n=document.getElementById('q7n');if(n)n.className='qnx';
}
function ansQ7(i){var q=Q7[q7i];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#q7o .qo');opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});var fb=document.getElementById('q7f');if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');q7s++;if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}}else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}}var n=document.getElementById('q7n');if(n)n.className='qnx show';}
function nxQ7(){q7i++;showQ7();}

// ======== ARTE POPUPS ========
MD.art_cad={ico:'&#128187;',tag:'CAD',h:'Computer Aided Design',b:'<p>Il <strong>CAD</strong> &egrave; il software che ha rivoluzionato la progettazione ingegneristica:</p><ul><li><strong>AutoCAD:</strong> il pi&ugrave; diffuso, 2D e 3D. Usato da 40 anni</li><li><strong>SolidWorks:</strong> specializzato in meccanica e robotica</li><li><strong>Fusion 360:</strong> gratuito per studenti, ottimo per iniziare</li><li><strong>CATIA:</strong> usato da Airbus e Ferrari</li><li>Prima del CAD si disegnava a mano su carta millimetrata</li></ul>'};
MD.art_quote={ico:'&#128196;',tag:'QUOTE',h:'Disegno Tecnico e Quote',b:'<p>Un <strong>disegno tecnico</strong> non &egrave; un disegno artistico: deve contenere informazioni precise:</p><ul><li><strong>Quote:</strong> le misure esatte di ogni parte (in mm)</li><li><strong>Viste:</strong> frontale, laterale, dall&apos;alto, sezione</li><li><strong>Tolleranze:</strong> di quanto pu&ograve; variare una misura (+/-0.1mm)</li><li><strong>Materiali:</strong> specificati nella tabella del disegno</li><li>Senza quote corrette il robot non pu&ograve; essere costruito</li></ul>'};
MD.art_3d={ico:'&#9881;',tag:'STAMPA 3D',h:'Dal Progetto al Prototipo',b:'<p>La <strong>stampa 3D</strong> ha rivoluzionato la prototipazione robotica:</p><ul><li>Dal file CAD alla parte fisica in poche ore</li><li>Materiali: PLA, ABS, TPU flessibile, resina, nylon</li><li>Precisione fino a 0.1mm</li><li>Boston Dynamics stampa in 3D molti componenti dei suoi robot</li><li>Un prototipo che costava 10.000&euro; nel 1990 oggi costa 10&euro;</li></ul>'};
MD.art_mano={ico:'&#128075;',tag:'MANO ROBOTICA',h:'Progettare una Mano Robotica',b:'<p>La mano robotica &egrave; uno dei meccanismi pi&ugrave; complessi da progettare:</p><ul><li>La mano umana ha <strong>27 ossa</strong> e <strong>34 muscoli</strong></li><li>Una mano robotica moderna ha 10-24 gradi di libert&agrave;</li><li>Si usano tendini in Dyneema per simulare i muscoli</li><li>La Shadow Robot Hand (UK) &egrave; la pi&ugrave; avanzata: 24 DOF</li><li>Ogni dito ha 3 falangi, ognuna controllata separatamente</li></ul>'};
MD.art_fem={ico:'&#128293;',tag:'ANALISI FEM',h:'Analisi agli Elementi Finiti',b:'<p>L&apos;<strong>analisi FEM</strong> divide il pezzo in migliaia di elementi piccoli e simula le forze:</p><ul><li>Mostra dove il materiale &egrave; sotto stress massimo (rosso)</li><li>Permette di alleggerire dove lo stress &egrave; basso</li><li>Simula: forze, vibrazioni, temperatura, fatica del materiale</li><li>Un&apos;analisi FEM ha salvato il telaio della Formula 1 di Ferrari nel 2003</li></ul>'};
MD.art_iter={ico:'&#9654;',tag:'ITERAZIONE',h:'Il Processo Iterativo',b:'<p>La progettazione non &egrave; lineare: &egrave; un <strong>ciclo continuo</strong>:</p><ul><li>Progetta &rarr; Prototipa &rarr; Testa &rarr; Analizza &rarr; Migliora &rarr; Ripeti</li><li>Il robot Spot di Boston Dynamics ha richiesto <strong>7 anni</strong> di iterazioni</li><li>La prima versione di ASIMO (Honda) era 4 volte pi&ugrave; grande di quella finale</li><li>Ogni fallimento &egrave; un dato: insegna cosa NON funziona</li></ul>'};

// ======== PART 8 MATEMATICA ========
function goToP8(){
  curPart=8;
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3','scP4','scP5','scP6','scP7'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  try{
    var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
    function sw(f0,f1,s,d,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type='sine';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.05,now+s+.08);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    sw(220,440,0,1.5,.05);sw(440,880,1,1.5,.04);sw(880,660,2,1,.04);sw(660,330,3,.8,.03);
  }catch(e){}
  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP8');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    var d1=document.createElement('div');
    d1.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    d1.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);color:rgba(180,80,255,.85);letter-spacing:.5em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">&mdash; OTTAVA PARTE &mdash;</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,6rem);font-weight:900;color:#cc88ff;text-shadow:0 0 40px #9944cc,0 0 80px rgba(150,80,255,.4);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">MATEMATICA</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.4vw,.8rem);color:rgba(180,80,255,.7);letter-spacing:.3em;margin-top:8px;">MAT &mdash; ALG &mdash; GEOMETRIA</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(d1);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='1';},80);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(d1.parentNode)d1.parentNode.removeChild(d1);
        var d2=document.createElement('div');
        d2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;max-width:88vw;';
        d2.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.85rem,2.8vw,2rem);color:#cc88ff;text-shadow:0 0 20px #9944cc;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.65;">CALCOLARE MASSA, VOLUME<br>E GRANDEZZA<br><span style=\"font-size:.68em;color:#9944cc;font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace\">per la realizzazione di parti robotiche</span></div>';
        document.body.appendChild(d2);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='1';},80);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){if(d2.parentNode)d2.parentNode.removeChild(d2);},800);},2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP8');initQ8();initGeo3D();
  },4000);
}

// ======== 3D GEOMETRY CALCULATOR ========
var geoShape='cube';
var geoRY=0.5,geoRX=-0.3,geoDrag=false,geoLX=0,geoLY=0;

function geoSelect(shape,btn){
  geoShape=shape;
  document.querySelectorAll('.geoBtn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('sel');});
  if(btn)btn.classList.add('sel');
  // Update inputs
  var inp=document.getElementById('geoInputs');
  if(!inp)return;
  var templates={
    cube:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; LATO (a) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_a" type="number" value="5" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>',
    box:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; LUNGHEZZA (a) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_a" type="number" value="8" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/><label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; LARGHEZZA (b) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_b" type="number" value="4" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/><label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; ALTEZZA (c) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_c" type="number" value="3" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>',
    sphere:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; RAGGIO (r) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_r" type="number" value="4" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>',
    cylinder:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; RAGGIO (r) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_r" type="number" value="3" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/><label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; ALTEZZA (h) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_h" type="number" value="8" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>',
    cone:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; RAGGIO (r) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_r" type="number" value="3" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/><label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; ALTEZZA (h) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_h" type="number" value="6" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>',
    torus:'<label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; RAGGIO GRANDE (R) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_R" type="number" value="5" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/><label class="geoInputLabel">&gt; RAGGIO PICCOLO (r) cm:</label><input class="geoInput" id="gi_r" type="number" value="2" min="0.1" step="0.1" oninput="geoCalc()"/>'
  };
  inp.innerHTML=templates[shape]||templates.cube;
  geoCalc();
}

function geoCalc(){
  var V=0,A=0,vf='',af='';
  var pi=Math.PI;
  function g(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?parseFloat(el.value)||1:1;}
  switch(geoShape){
    case 'cube': {var a=g('gi_a');V=a*a*a;A=6*a*a;vf='V = a³';af='A = 6a²';break;}
    case 'box': {var a=g('gi_a'),b=g('gi_b'),c=g('gi_c');V=a*b*c;A=2*(a*b+b*c+a*c);vf='V = a×b×c';af='A = 2(ab+bc+ac)';break;}
    case 'sphere': {var r=g('gi_r');V=(4/3)*pi*r*r*r;A=4*pi*r*r;vf='V = ⅔πr³';af='A = 4πr²';break;}
    case 'cylinder': {var r=g('gi_r'),h=g('gi_h');V=pi*r*r*h;A=2*pi*r*(r+h);vf='V = πr²h';af='A = 2πr(r+h)';break;}
    case 'cone': {var r=g('gi_r'),h=g('gi_h'),l=Math.sqrt(r*r+h*h);V=(1/3)*pi*r*r*h;A=pi*r*(r+l);vf='V = ⅓πr²h';af='A = πr(r+l)';break;}
    case 'torus': {var R=g('gi_R'),r=g('gi_r');V=2*pi*pi*R*r*r;A=4*pi*pi*R*r;vf='V = 2π²Rr²';af='A = 4π²Rr';break;}
  }
  var mass=V*7.85; // steel density
  var rv=document.getElementById('resVol'),ra=document.getElementById('resArea'),rm=document.getElementById('resMass');
  var rvf=document.getElementById('resVolF'),raf=document.getElementById('resAreaF');
  if(rv)rv.innerHTML=V.toFixed(2)+' cm³';
  if(ra)ra.innerHTML=A.toFixed(2)+' cm²';
  if(rm)rm.innerHTML=mass>=1000?(mass/1000).toFixed(3)+' kg':mass.toFixed(1)+' g';
  if(rvf)rvf.textContent=vf;
  if(raf)raf.textContent=af;
}

function initGeo3D(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('geoCanvas');
  var wp=document.getElementById('geoCanvasWrap');
  if(!cv||!wp)return;
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  function resize(){cv.width=wp.offsetWidth||280;cv.height=wp.offsetHeight||340;}
  resize();
  try{new ResizeObserver(resize).observe(wp);}catch(e){}

  function P3(x,y,z){
    var cY=Math.cos(geoRY),sY=Math.sin(geoRY),cX=Math.cos(geoRX),sX=Math.sin(geoRX);
    var rx=x*cY+z*sY,rz=-x*sY+z*cY;
    var ry=y*cX-rz*sX,rz2=y*sX+rz*cX;
    var d=500/(500+rz2+300);
    return{x:cv.width/2+rx*d*90,y:cv.height/2+ry*d*90,d:d};
  }
  function edge(ax,ay,az,bx,by,bz,col,lw){
    var A=P3(ax,ay,az),B=P3(bx,by,bz);
    cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(A.x,A.y);cx.lineTo(B.x,B.y);
    cx.strokeStyle=col||'rgba(180,80,255,.7)';cx.lineWidth=lw||1.2;cx.stroke();
  }
  function face(pts,col){
    cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(pts[0].x,pts[0].y);
    for(var i=1;i<pts.length;i++)cx.lineTo(pts[i].x,pts[i].y);
    cx.closePath();cx.fillStyle=col;cx.fill();
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(180,80,255,.5)';cx.lineWidth=1;cx.stroke();
  }

  function drawShape(){
    cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    var bg=cx.createRadialGradient(cv.width/2,cv.height/2,0,cv.width/2,cv.height/2,180);
    bg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(40,0,80,.3)');bg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    cx.fillStyle=bg;cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    cx.strokeStyle='rgba(100,0,200,.1)';cx.lineWidth=.6;
    for(var gi=0;gi<8;gi++){var gp=P3(-1.5+gi*.5,1.2,0),gp2=P3(-1.5+gi*.5,-1.2,0);cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(gp.x,gp.y);cx.lineTo(gp2.x,gp2.y);cx.stroke();}

    var t=Date.now()*.0005;
    var c1='rgba(120,40,200,.35)',c2='rgba(150,60,255,.25)',c3='rgba(100,20,180,.3)';

    if(geoShape==='cube'){
      var s=1;
      var verts=[[-s,-s,-s],[s,-s,-s],[s,s,-s],[-s,s,-s],[-s,-s,s],[s,-s,s],[s,s,s],[-s,s,s]];
      var faces=[[0,1,2,3],[4,5,6,7],[0,1,5,4],[2,3,7,6],[0,3,7,4],[1,2,6,5]];
      var cols=[c1,c2,c3,c1,c2,c3];
      faces.forEach(function(fi,i){face(fi.map(function(v){return P3.apply(null,verts[v]);}),cols[i]);});
    } else if(geoShape==='box'){
      var a=1.2,b=.7,c2v=.5;
      var v=[[-a,-b,-c2v],[a,-b,-c2v],[a,b,-c2v],[-a,b,-c2v],[-a,-b,c2v],[a,-b,c2v],[a,b,c2v],[-a,b,c2v]];
      var fs2=[[0,1,2,3],[4,5,6,7],[0,1,5,4],[2,3,7,6],[0,3,7,4],[1,2,6,5]];
      fs2.forEach(function(fi,i){face(fi.map(function(v2){return P3.apply(null,v[v2]);}),i%2?c1:c2);});
    } else if(geoShape==='sphere'){
      var segs=12;
      for(var lat=0;lat<segs;lat++){
        for(var lon=0;lon<segs;lon++){
          var th1=lat/segs*Math.PI-Math.PI/2,th2=(lat+1)/segs*Math.PI-Math.PI/2;
          var ph1=lon/segs*2*Math.PI,ph2=(lon+1)/segs*2*Math.PI;
          var p1=[Math.cos(th1)*Math.cos(ph1),Math.sin(th1),Math.cos(th1)*Math.sin(ph1)];
          var p2=[Math.cos(th1)*Math.cos(ph2),Math.sin(th1),Math.cos(th1)*Math.sin(ph2)];
          var p3=[Math.cos(th2)*Math.cos(ph2),Math.sin(th2),Math.cos(th2)*Math.sin(ph2)];
          var p4=[Math.cos(th2)*Math.cos(ph1),Math.sin(th2),Math.cos(th2)*Math.sin(ph1)];
          var bright=(p1[0]+p1[1]+.5)/2;
          face([P3(p1[0],p1[1],p1[2]),P3(p2[0],p2[1],p2[2]),P3(p3[0],p3[1],p3[2]),P3(p4[0],p4[1],p4[2])],'rgba('+(80+Math.round(bright*80))+','+(0)+','+(150+Math.round(bright*60))+',.35)');
        }
      }
    } else if(geoShape==='cylinder'){
      var segs=16,r=.8,h=1.2;
      for(var i=0;i<segs;i++){
        var a1=i/segs*2*Math.PI,a2=(i+1)/segs*2*Math.PI;
        face([P3(r*Math.cos(a1),-h,r*Math.sin(a1)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),-h,r*Math.sin(a2)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),h,r*Math.sin(a2)),P3(r*Math.cos(a1),h,r*Math.sin(a1))],i%2?c1:c3);
        face([P3(0,-h,0),P3(r*Math.cos(a1),-h,r*Math.sin(a1)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),-h,r*Math.sin(a2))],c2);
        face([P3(0,h,0),P3(r*Math.cos(a1),h,r*Math.sin(a1)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),h,r*Math.sin(a2))],c2);
      }
    } else if(geoShape==='cone'){
      var segs=16,r=.9,h=1.4;
      for(var i=0;i<segs;i++){
        var a1=i/segs*2*Math.PI,a2=(i+1)/segs*2*Math.PI;
        face([P3(r*Math.cos(a1),-h/2,r*Math.sin(a1)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),-h/2,r*Math.sin(a2)),P3(0,h/2,0)],i%2?c1:c3);
        face([P3(0,-h/2,0),P3(r*Math.cos(a1),-h/2,r*Math.sin(a1)),P3(r*Math.cos(a2),-h/2,r*Math.sin(a2))],c2);
      }
    } else if(geoShape==='torus'){
      var R=.8,r=.3,maj=14,min=10;
      for(var i=0;i<maj;i++){for(var j=0;j<min;j++){
        var u1=i/maj*2*Math.PI,u2=(i+1)/maj*2*Math.PI,v1=j/min*2*Math.PI,v2=(j+1)/min*2*Math.PI;
        function tp(u,v){return[(R+r*Math.cos(v))*Math.cos(u),(R+r*Math.cos(v))*Math.sin(u),r*Math.sin(v)];}
        var p1=tp(u1,v1),p2=tp(u2,v1),p3=tp(u2,v2),p4=tp(u1,v2);
        face([P3(p1[0],p1[2],p1[1]),P3(p2[0],p2[2],p2[1]),P3(p3[0],p3[2],p3[1]),P3(p4[0],p4[2],p4[1])],(i+j)%2?c1:c3);
      }}
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(drawShape);
  }
  drawShape();

  // Drag to rotate
  wp.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){geoDrag=true;geoLX=e.clientX;geoLY=e.clientY;e.preventDefault();});
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!geoDrag)return;geoRY+=(e.clientX-geoLX)*.016;geoRX+=(e.clientY-geoLY)*.013;geoLX=e.clientX;geoLY=e.clientY;});
  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){geoDrag=false;});
  wp.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){geoDrag=true;geoLX=e.touches[0].clientX;geoLY=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){if(!geoDrag)return;geoRY+=(e.touches[0].clientX-geoLX)*.016;geoRX+=(e.touches[0].clientY-geoLY)*.013;geoLX=e.touches[0].clientX;geoLY=e.touches[0].clientY;},{passive:true});
  wp.addEventListener('touchend',function(){geoDrag=false;});

  geoCalc();
}

// ======== QUIZ 8 ========
var Q8=[
  {q:'Come si calcola il volume di una sfera?',o:['V = \u03c0r\u00b2h','V = a\u00b3','V = \u2154\u03c0r\u00b3','V = \u03c0r(r+l)'],a:2,e:'V = 4/3\u03c0r\u00b3! La formula della sfera: quattro terzi per pi greco per il raggio al cubo.'},
  {q:'Qual\u00e8 la densit\u00e0 approssimativa dell\u2019acciaio?',o:['2.7 g/cm\u00b3','7.85 g/cm\u00b3','11.3 g/cm\u00b3','0.9 g/cm\u00b3'],a:1,e:'7.85 g/cm\u00b3! Conoscere la densit\u00e0 permette di calcolare la massa da Volume x Densit\u00e0.'},
  {q:'Quale figura 3D ha come volume V = \u03c0r\u00b2h?',o:['Cono','Sfera','Cubo','Cilindro'],a:3,e:'Il CILINDRO! V = \u03c0r\u00b2h. Il cilindro \u00e8 la forma pi\u00f9 comune nei bracci e motori robotici.'},
  {q:'Come si calcola la massa di un componente robotico?',o:['M = A / V','M = V x \u03c1','M = V + \u03c1','M = \u03c1 / V'],a:1,e:'M = V \u00d7 \u03c1! Massa = Volume per Densit\u00e0 del materiale. Fondamentale per calcolare il peso del robot.'},
  {q:'Quale figura geometrica viene usata principalmente per i giunti sferici?',o:['Cubo','Cilindro','Sfera','Cono'],a:2,e:'La SFERA! I giunti sferici permettono rotazione in tutte le direzioni. Formula: V = 4/3\u03c0r\u00b3, A = 4\u03c0r\u00b2.'}
];
var q8i=0,q8s=0;
function initQ8(){q8i=0;q8s=0;showQ8();}
function showQ8(){
  if(q8i>=Q8.length){endQ('qb8','\u0394',q8s,Q8.length,'initQ8');return;}
  var q=Q8[q8i];
  var t=document.getElementById('q8t');if(t)t.textContent='Domanda '+(q8i+1)+'/'+Q8.length+': '+q.q;
  var el=document.getElementById('q8o');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML='';
  q.o.forEach(function(o,i){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='qo';b.textContent=o;b.onclick=function(){ansQ8(i);};el.appendChild(b);});
  var f=document.getElementById('q8f');if(f)f.className='qfb';
  var n=document.getElementById('q8n');if(n)n.className='qnx';
}
function ansQ8(i){var q=Q8[q8i];var opts=document.querySelectorAll('#q8o .qo');opts.forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';});var fb=document.getElementById('q8f');if(i===q.a){opts[i].classList.add('ok');q8s++;if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ok';}}else{opts[i].classList.add('ko');opts[q.a].classList.add('ok');if(fb){fb.textContent=q.e;fb.className='qfb show ko';}}var n=document.getElementById('q8n');if(n)n.className='qnx show';}
function nxQ8(){q8i++;showQ8();}

// ======== MATEMATICA POPUPS ========
MD.mat_massa={ico:'\u2696',tag:'MASSA',h:'Calcolo della Massa',b:'<p>La <strong>massa</strong> di un componente si calcola moltiplicando volume per densit\u00e0 del materiale:</p><ul><li><strong>M = V \u00d7 \u03c1</strong></li><li>Acciaio: 7.85 g/cm\u00b3</li><li>Alluminio: 2.7 g/cm\u00b3</li><li>Titanio: 4.5 g/cm\u00b3</li><li>Fibra di carbonio: 1.55 g/cm\u00b3</li><li>La massa determina il carico sui motori e la batteria necessaria</li></ul>'};
MD.mat_volume={ico:'\u25a1',tag:'VOLUME',h:'Formule del Volume',b:'<p>Formule essenziali per la robotica:</p><ul><li><strong>Cubo:</strong> V = a\u00b3</li><li><strong>Parallelepipedo:</strong> V = a\u00d7b\u00d7c</li><li><strong>Sfera:</strong> V = \u2154\u03c0r\u00b3</li><li><strong>Cilindro:</strong> V = \u03c0r\u00b2h</li><li><strong>Cono:</strong> V = \u2153\u03c0r\u00b2h</li><li><strong>Toro:</strong> V = 2\u03c0\u00b2Rr\u00b2</li></ul>'};
MD.mat_area={ico:'\u25cb',tag:'AREA SUPERFICIALE',h:'Formule dell\u2019Area',b:'<p>L\u2019area superficiale determina la quantit\u00e0 di materiale per rivestimenti:</p><ul><li><strong>Cubo:</strong> A = 6a\u00b2</li><li><strong>Sfera:</strong> A = 4\u03c0r\u00b2</li><li><strong>Cilindro:</strong> A = 2\u03c0r(r+h)</li><li><strong>Cono:</strong> A = \u03c0r(r+l) dove l = apotema</li><li><strong>Parallelepipedo:</strong> A = 2(ab+bc+ac)</li></ul>'};
MD.mat_vettori={ico:'\u2192',tag:'VETTORI',h:'Vettori nella Robotica',b:'<p>I <strong>vettori</strong> descrivono direzione e intensit\u00e0 dei movimenti robotici:</p><ul><li>Posizione: P = (x, y, z)</li><li>Velocit\u00e0: v = ds/dt</li><li>Forza: F = ma</li><li>I 6 gradi di libert\u00e0 di un robot si esprimono come vettori</li><li>La cinematica inversa usa algebra vettoriale</li></ul>'};
MD.mat_trigon={ico:'\u2220',tag:'TRIGONOMETRIA',h:'Trigonometria e Angoli',b:'<p>La <strong>trigonometria</strong> calcola gli angoli dei giunti robotici:</p><ul><li>sin\u03b8 = opposto/ipotenusa</li><li>cos\u03b8 = adiacente/ipotenusa</li><li>tan\u03b8 = opposto/adiacente</li><li>Un braccio robotico a 6 assi richiede 6 equazioni trigonometriche</li><li>Atan2(y,x) calcola l\u2019angolo di ogni giunto</li></ul>'};
MD.mat_cinemtica={ico:'\u2699',tag:'CINEMATICA',h:'Cinematica Robotica',b:'<p>La <strong>cinematica</strong> studia il moto senza considerare le forze:</p><ul><li><strong>Cinematica diretta:</strong> dagli angoli dei giunti alla posizione</li><li><strong>Cinematica inversa:</strong> dalla posizione agli angoli (pi\u00f9 complessa)</li><li>Usa matrici di trasformazione 4\u00d74 (Denavit-Hartenberg)</li><li>Un braccio a 6 DOF ha 6 equazioni da risolvere simultaneamente</li></ul>'};

// ======== PART 9 INGLESE ========
function goToP9(){
  curPart=9;
  var bl=document.getElementById('tblack');
  if(bl){bl.style.opacity='1';bl.style.pointerEvents='all';}
  ['scIntro','scP1','scP2','scP3','scP4','scP5','scP6','scP7','scP8'].forEach(function(id){
    var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  try{
    var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();var now=ac.currentTime;
    function tn(f,s,d,t,v){var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();o.type=t||'sine';o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v||.05,now+s+.06);g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+.1);}
    [440,550,660,880,1100].forEach(function(f,i){tn(f,i*.22,.15,'square',.03);});
    tn(55,1.5,3,'triangle',.06);tn(110,2,2,'sine',.04);tn(220,3.5,1,'square',.03);
  }catch(e){}
  setTimeout(function(){
    if(bl){bl.style.opacity='0';bl.style.pointerEvents='none';}
    var sc=document.getElementById('scP9');
    if(sc){sc.classList.add('active');sc.scrollTop=0;}
    initCodeRain();
    // Title sequence
    var d1=document.createElement('div');
    d1.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;';
    d1.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.55rem,1.5vw,.85rem);color:rgba(200,200,200,.7);letter-spacing:.5em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">// NONA PARTE</div>'
      +'<div style="font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,9vw,6.5rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(255,255,255,.4);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;">INGLESE</div>';
    document.body.appendChild(d1);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='1';},80);
    setTimeout(function(){d1.style.opacity='0';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(d1.parentNode)d1.parentNode.removeChild(d1);
        var d2=document.createElement('div');
        d2.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:5000;text-align:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s;pointer-events:none;max-width:88vw;';
        d2.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:clamp(.9rem,3vw,2rem);color:#ccc;letter-spacing:.06em;line-height:1.7;">THE LANGUAGE<br>OF PROGRAMMING<br><span style=\"font-size:.65em;color:#777\">//\u00a0il\u00a0linguaggio\u00a0di\u00a0programmazione</span></div>';
        document.body.appendChild(d2);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='1';},80);
        setTimeout(function(){d2.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){if(d2.parentNode)d2.parentNode.removeChild(d2);},800);},2500);
      },800);
    },2500);
    RV('scP9');initQ9();
  },4000);
}

// ======== CODE RAIN BACKGROUND ========
function initCodeRain(){
  var cv=document.getElementById('codeRain');
  if(!cv)return;
  var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
  function resize(){cv.width=innerWidth;cv.height=innerHeight;}resize();
  addEventListener('resize',resize);
  var snippets=['function move(x,y)','for(var i=0;i<n;i++)','if(sensor.read()>0.5)','return Math.sqrt(x*x+y*y)','const angle=atan2(dy,dx)','robot.setAngle(joint,deg)','while(active){update();}','import numpy as np','class Robot extends Node:','def forward_kinematics():','this.motor.run(speed)','var velocity=0.0;','int main(){init();}','ros::NodeHandle nh;','sensor_msgs::JointState','pub.publish(msg)','tf::Transform t;','Eigen::Matrix4d T;','PID controller(kp,ki,kd)','void loop(){step();}','Serial.println(val)','analogWrite(pin,val)','#include <ros/ros.h>','printf("OK\n");'];
  var cols=Math.floor(cv.width/18);var rows=[];
  for(var i=0;i<cols;i++)rows.push({y:Math.random()*-1000,speed:.4+Math.random()*.8,snip:snippets[Math.floor(Math.random()*snippets.length)]});
  function draw(){
    cx.fillStyle='rgba(10,10,10,.06)';cx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    cx.font='11px Share Tech Mono,monospace';
    rows.forEach(function(r,i){
      cx.fillStyle=Math.random()>.95?'rgba(255,255,255,.5)':'rgba(150,150,150,.3)';
      cx.fillText(r.snip,i*18,r.y);
      r.y+=r.speed;
      if(r.y>cv.height+60){r.y=-60;r.snip=snippets[Math.floor(Math.random()*snippets.length)];}
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  draw();
}

// ======== AI CODING ASSISTANT ========
function runAI(){
  var input=document.getElementById('aiPromptInput');
  var prompt=input?input.value.trim():'';
  if(!prompt){
    var s=document.getElementById('aiStatus');
    if(s)s.textContent='> ERROR: Write a description first!';
    return;
  }
  var btn=document.getElementById('aiSendBtn');
  var loading=document.getElementById('aiLoading');
  var results=document.getElementById('aiResults');
  var status=document.getElementById('aiStatus');
  if(btn)btn.disabled=true;
  if(loading)loading.style.display='block';
  if(results)results.style.display='none';
  if(status)status.textContent='> SENDING TO AI... PLEASE WAIT';

  fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{
      'Content-Type':'application/json',
      'anthropic-version':'2023-06-01',
      'anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access':'true'
    },
    body:JSON.stringify({
      model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
      max_tokens:3000,
      system:'You are an expert HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript developer. Output ONLY a complete self-contained HTML file. No markdown fences, no explanation, no comments outside code. Start immediately with <!DOCTYPE html>. Make it visually stunning with animations, dark theme, fully interactive.',
      messages:[
        {role:'user',content:'Create this as a beautiful interactive HTML page: '+prompt+'. Output ONLY raw HTML starting with <!DOCTYPE html>, no markdown, no explanation.'}
      ]
    })
  })
  .then(function(r){
    if(!r.ok){
      return r.text().then(function(t){throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status+': '+t.slice(0,200));});
    }
    return r.json();
  })
  .then(function(data){
    var code='<!DOCTYPE html>';
    if(data.content){
      data.content.forEach(function(b){if(b.type==='text')code+=b.text;});
    }
    code=code.replace(/```html?\n?/gi,'').replace(/```\s*$/,'').trim();
    if(code.length<100){
      code='<!DOCTYPE html><html><body style="background:#111;color:#0f0;font-family:monospace;padding:30px;text-align:center"><h2>Empty response — try again!</h2></body></html>';
    }
    showAIResult(code);
  })
  .catch(function(err){
    console.error('AI error:',err);
    if(status)status.textContent='> ERROR: '+err.message;
    // Show animated demo as fallback
    var demo='<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><style>*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background:#0a0a1a;overflow:hidden}</style></head><body><canvas id="c"></canvas><script>var c=document.getElementById("c"),x=c.getContext("2d");function r(){c.width=innerWidth;c.height=innerHeight;}r();var p=[];for(var i=0;i<80;i++)p.push({x:Math.random()*c.width,y:Math.random()*c.height,r:2+Math.random()*3,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*2,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*2,h:Math.random()*360});(function loop(){x.fillStyle="rgba(10,10,26,.15)";x.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);p.forEach(function(q){q.x+=q.vx;q.y+=q.vy;if(q.x<0||q.x>c.width)q.vx*=-1;if(q.y<0||q.y>c.height)q.vy*=-1;x.beginPath();x.arc(q.x,q.y,q.r,0,6.28);x.fillStyle="hsl("+q.h+",100%,60%)";x.shadowBlur=8;x.shadowColor=x.fillStyle;x.fill()});requestAnimationFrame(loop)})();<\/script><div style="position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-family:monospace;text-align:center;pointer-events:none">API not reachable<br><small>Showing demo</small></div></body></html>';
    showAIResult(demo);
  })
  .finally(function(){
    if(btn)btn.disabled=false;
    if(loading)loading.style.display='none';
  });
}
function showAIResult(code){
  var codeEl=document.getElementById('aiCodeContent');
  var results=document.getElementById('aiResults');
  var status=document.getElementById('aiStatus');
  var iframe=document.getElementById('aiPreviewIframe');
  if(codeEl){
    var esc=code.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
    esc=esc.replace(/\b(function|var|const|let|return|if|else|for|while|class|import|export|new|this|true|false|null|undefined)\b/g,'<span class="kw">$1</span>');
    esc=esc.replace(/\b(\d+\.?\d*)\b/g,'<span class="num">$1</span>');
    codeEl.innerHTML=esc;
  }
  if(iframe)iframe.srcdoc=code;
  if(results)results.style.display='flex';
  if(status)status.textContent='> OK: '+code.length+' chars. Preview running.';
  window._lastAICode=code;
}


function copyAICode(){
  if(window._lastAICode){
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(window._lastAICode).then(function(){
      var s=document.getElementById('aiStatus');if(s)s.textContent='> CODE COPIED TO CLIPBOARD!';
    }).catch(function(){
      var s=document.getElementById('aiStatus');if(s)s.textContent='> COPY FAILED - SELECT CODE MANUALLY';
    });
  }
}

// ======== QUIZ 9 ========
var Q9=[
  {q:'Which programming language is most used in AI and robotics today?',o:['Java','Python','Pascal','COBOL'],a:1,e:'Python! Its simple syntax and powerful libraries (NumPy, TensorFlow, ROS) make it the #1 choice for robotics and AI.'},
  {q:'What does ROS stand for?',o:['Robotic Output System','Robot Operating System','Runtime Object Sequence','Relay Operating Software'],a:1,e:'Robot Operating System! It\u0027s the standard framework for professional robot programming used worldwide.'},
  {q:'Which language is used when speed is critical in real-time robot control?',o:['JavaScript','PHP','C++','Ruby'],a:2,e:'C++! It\u0027s the fastest compiled language and is used by NASA, SpaceX and Neuralink for real-time systems.'},
  {q:'What does this code do? for(var i=0; i<10; i++)',o:['Defines a function','Creates a loop 10 times','Checks a condition','Imports a library'],a:1,e:'A loop that runs 10 times! This is one of the most fundamental programming constructs.'},
  {q:'Which language is primarily used for web-based robot interfaces?',o:['Assembly','MATLAB','JavaScript','Fortran'],a:2,e:'JavaScript! It\u0027s the language of the web. Used to build control dashboards and interfaces for robots.'}
];
var q9i=0,q9s=0;
